L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Cunning or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Life Bet
L8.description: You reduce your HP to 1 and make a Heavy attack against the target. You gain a bonus to the damage roll of this attack equal to the amount of HP you lost through this ability. If this attack fails to meet the base evasion of the target, the HP you lost is refunded. It still counts as your one secret art use of the fight regardless.

L1.name: Surgical Precision
L1.description: When you deal damage with a one-handed melee weapon that is both Sure Hit and Full Pierce or a critical hit, you inflict Bleeding on the target for 1 turn. This effect stacks with other Bleeds effects and itself up to 3 times.

L2.name: Exposing Stab
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you may use your Devastating Strike against the target until the end of your turn as if the target had 0 RP.

L3.name: Feinting Stab
L3.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If they react to it in any way, you may cancel your attack on them and instead make it against a different enemy in range. Any RP spent by the first target is not refunded.

L4.name: Devastating Strike II
L4.description: You make a Light attack against the target. The dice are maximized instead of rolling.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Cunning, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Artery Cut
L8.description: You change the arc of your weapon and go for a vital spot, turning the hit into a critical hit.

L1.name: Spell Transfer
L1.description: When you use the Create Talisman ability, an ally may spend their Errand action to use one of their spells to put on the talisman instead of your own. You only create 1 copy of this talisman per Errand action and cannot use Secret Art spells with it.

L2.name: Prepared Talisman
L2.description: You may place a Talisman on a surface or on a target within range. This costs the same amount of AP and Mana as it would normally cost and placing it on an unwilling target requires an accuracy roll that the target may dodge as normal. A target may spend AP equal to the AP cost of the talisman (before reductions) to remove the talisman from themselves. After placing it, until the end of the encounter or for the next 5 minutes, you may spend 0 RP to instantly trigger the effect of the talisman. You cannot trigger it anymore once a talisman has been removed or is in the process of being removed and a removed talisman loses its power entirely. A talisman placed on a creature gains Sure Hit against the creature it's on when triggered. You can only have 1 talisman prepared in this way at the same time and Sealing Talisman cannot be prepared like this. A placed talisman cannot have an AP cost of greater than 4 (or 10 seconds for casting times).

L3.name: Spiritual Reading
L3.description: You are able to check the aura of a creature or object within range.  If you check a creature, you can see whether a creature is non-heroic, weaker than you, around the same as you, stronger than you or much stronger than you. The GM may also give you their Spirit Core value if it has one. You also are aware if someone is concealing their spirit core level, but can’t get an accurate reading of their strength if they are. In addition, you are able to see their mana % until the end of the encounter. If you check an item, you can determine whether it’s magical in nature. If it is, you may immediately make a Magic check against it to determine its effect as if you were using Decipher Magic with a +5 bonus.

L4.name: Talisman Recursion
L4.description: After using a Talisman, you may immediately spend the cost of that talisman (before reductions) to repeat the effect without consuming another talisman. If the talisman had a target, you must choose the same target. Does not work with Secret Talismans.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Medicine, Religion, Magic Perception, Insight, Art or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Within This Ink, The Perfect Answer
L8.description: You draw and immediately use a special talisman. This talisman may have any spell in the base game on it (meaning it’s on the website), though it cannot be a secret or esoteric art. Any costs for this spell must be paid as normal. You must pay the required calligraphy units as if you made the spell yourself. If you can’t pay the required amount, you go into ‘debt’. While in debt, you cannot create any more talisman or use this ability. To clear the debt, you must pay the required amount of calligraphy units at any point. After you use this ability, you cannot do so again until the end of the arc.

L1.name: Soul Absorption
L1.description: You gain Elemental Mastery: Dark You may use Soul Absorption.

L2.name: Gloom Infusion
L2.description: You surround a willing target in gloom and shadow, changing their typing to Dark II. As a Dark II type, they take half damage from Dark Damage or attacks with the Dark keywords, unless the attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Holy Damage or attacks with the Holy keyword. While the ward lasts, they also gain 60 feet Darkvision and a +4 bonus to saves against mind affecting effects.  The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.

L3.name: Dark Healing
L3.description: You take Light (1 AP) or Heavy damage (2 AP), then heal a target within range an amount equal to damage taken. You may choose to ignore Dark resistance or damage reduction on yourself for this damage.

L4.name: Dark Barrier
L4.description: You and up to 4 other willing allies within range take Light Dark damage. Afterwards they gain temporary HP until end of encounter equal to double the damage taken. You may choose to ignore Dark resistance or damage reduction on your allies for this ability.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Religion, Magic, History, Appraise, Deception, Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason or Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Stygian Screen
L8.description: You create a wall of darkness that is 20ft long, 5ft wide and 10ft high. This wall must be a straight line.  This wall blocks line of sight. Targets inside of the wall can only see 5ft away

L1.name: Superior Assessment
L1.description: You may use Status Assessment III.

L2.name: Disarming Shot
L2.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. If the attack beat the passive evasion of the target (before Dodge bonuses), you Disarm the target until the start of your next turn. The target may spend 1 RP to avoid the disarm effect. This is in addition to any RP the target may spend to avoid the attack itself.

L3.name: Countershot
L3.description: You may make a Precise Attack against the incoming attack. If your accuracy check matches or beats the enemy’s accuracy check, you shoot down the incoming arrow and the attack is negated.

L4.name: Aimed Shot
L4.description: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness, Cunning or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Perfect Repetition
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On damage, on the next turn, you may repeat this attack against the same target using the same accuracy check as the initial attack. You may continue to repeat this attack on subsequent turns until you spend a turn not using this move or if the attack fails to deal damage.

L1.name: Bone Armor
L1.description: You may use Bone Armor.

L2.name: Unholy Pact
L2.description: You remove your  Bone Armor to heal yourself for Power x 2 and gain a +2 Power bonus on your next attack.

L3.name: Call of the Grave
L3.description: You make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Dark damage. On hit, if the target is large or smaller, you pull them to you. They are Challenged until the start of your next turn. This ability does not provoke an attack of opportunity.

L4.name: Can't Escape Death
L4.description: You may use this after an enemy leaves your melee range. After the target finishes moving, you may sidestep up to your speed towards them. For 1 RP, you may move double your speed instead.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Athletics, Religion, Survival, Intimidation, Perception, Insight or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Unholy Strength
L8.description: You Gain Unholy Strength which grants +2 Power and Focus. While Unholy Strength is active your attacks/abilities that use your melee weapon to deal physical damage inflict Dark Damage instead and your  Bone Armor will not break from damage.  Upkeep: 1 Mana.

L1.name: Jump
L1.description: When using an ability with the Jump keyword, you do not take fall damage. You may use Jump.

L2.name: Skydive
L2.description: You target an enemy below you, no more than 5ft away from you horizontally. You then immediately dive down to that target, making a Heavy Attack against them. You deal an additional point of damage for every 10ft you fell before making the attack, up to 10 extra damage.

L3.name: Dragonfire Dive
L3.description: You jump to the target, not provoking any attacks of opportunity, and attacking the target plus all other creatures within 5ft of the target for Heavy Fire Damage.

L4.name: Jump Back
L4.description: You Jump Back to your previous location. This movement does not provoke any attacks of opportunity.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception, Common Knowledge or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM Approval). You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Dragonslaying Jump
L8.description: You Jump up to the target, not provoking any attacks of opportunity, and make a Heavy Attack against it. On damage, the target plummets to the ground taking falling damage as normal. Overcharge: You may spend additional AP on this ability to increase the range by 60ft for every extra AP spent. If this increases the AP cost to more than what you currently have, it gains the Setup keyword.

L1.name: Deflect Everything
L1.description: You may use your Parry ability against every kind of attack, as well as against Save effects that you could Block.

L2.name: Forward Momentum
L2.description: Until the start of your next turn, on damage of every melee attack you make, you may push the target back 5ft. You must then move 5ft towards that target (if possible to do safely) without provoking attacks of opportunity. This only works with attacks that target a single enemy.

L3.name: Riposte II
L3.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that you used your Parry ability against.

L4.name: Duelist Blow
L4.description: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Your next Block or Dodge reaction against that target costs 0 RP. This benefit disappears when you use an RP ability against a target other than the target of this ability.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Deception, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness, Cunning or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Secret Art: Endless Waltz
L8.description: You make two Light Attacks against the same target. On damage of this attack, you may repeat this attack for 0 AP. Killing Blow: You may move up to twice your speed without provoking attacks of opportunity.

L1.name: Earth Weapon
L1.description: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Earth Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare you chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

L2.name: Strata Cut
L2.description: You make a Precise attack against the target.  Combo : If used after Tectonic Overhead, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

L3.name: Tectonic Overhead
L3.description: You make a slow, powerful overhead swing and make a Heavy attack against the target. Their evasion (but not dodge) is doubled for this attack.

L4.name: Weight of the Mountain
L4.description: You prepare to strike with enhanced power. Your next attack with a two-handed melee weapon this turn loses the keywords: Lock On and Sure Hit. In addition, you do not gain accuracy from your Focus on the enhanced attack. The attack also cannot benefit from Offstep and similar effects that guarantee the attack hits. Instead, the attack deals extra damage equal to the accuracy lost from not gaining Focus due to Weight of the Mountain. If the attack is a heavy or precise attack, it deals extra damage equal to double the accuracy lost instead.  If the attack made with this effect already did not benefit from focus, this ability has no effect.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Magic, Survival, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus.

L8.name: Measured Collapse
L8.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack is always considered to have rolled a 2 for accuracy instead of rolling the d20. Against creatures that are large size, gain a +2 bonus. If they are huge size, gain a +4 bonus.

L1.name: Superconductor
L1.description: When you make an attack that deals Lightning damage to a target afflicted with Static, you gain a +1 accuracy bonus. You gain Elemental Mastery: Lightning.

L2.name: Zap
L2.description: You may make a Light attack against the target, dealing Lightning damage. On damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus X 3.

L3.name: Bolting
L3.description: You may make a Heavy Attack that deals Lightning Damage with a bolt from the sky. On damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus x 3. As the attack from the sky, any cover is calculated from above the target rather than from your path to the target.

L4.name: Forked Lightning
L4.description: You make a Light Attack against two different targets who can be no further than 20ft apart, dealing Lightning Damage and on damage, inflict Static X where X equals your Focus x 2.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Chain Lightning
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target dealing Lightning Damage and inflicting Static X where X equals your Focus x 3. On damage, you may repeat this attack against another target within 30ft of the target without paying additional costs. This attack may repeat multiple times like this. You cannot target the same creature more than once per use of this ability.

L1.name: Lightning Strikes Twice
L1.description: When the Static you apply deals damage to an enemy, that enemy becomes afflicted with Static X, where X is the value of the Static that damaged it.

L2.name: Thunderstorm
L2.description: You may make a Light Attack that deals Lightning damage against all target enemies in range. As the attack comes from the sky, any cover is calculated from above the target rather than from your path to the target.

L3.name: Static Overload
L3.description: A single target in range must make a save or immediately take Lightning damage equal to their Static and become inflicted with  Daze .

L4.name: Static Discharge
L4.description: A single target in range must make a save or the Static stacks on them immediately discharge, triggering the Static effect as though it was the end of the target’s turn. Whether the target succeeds at or fails the save, they lose all Static charges.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Magic, Flight, Perception or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Lightning Field
L8.description: You conjure a statically charged field around you, applying Static X where X equals your Focus x 3 to all enemies within 30ft of you. Enemies already afflicted by Static immediately take damage equal to 3 + half the static value. While within your Lightning Field, the Static on enemies is not removed at the end of their turn. This field lasts until the end of your next turn. Upkeep: You may pay 1 Mana at the start of your turn to repeat the initial effect and extend the duration of the field by 1 turn.

L1.name: Elemental Convergence
L1.description: You may use Elemental Convergence.

L2.name: Magic Blast II
L2.description: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the target that deals Arcane damage. If you have an element mastered, you may change the damage of this spell to that element.

L3.name: Elemental Bolt
L3.description: You make a Light attack against the target. The damage type is chosen at the type of casting and must be that of an element you have mastered.  On damage, inflict an effect based on the damage type of this attack: Arcane: The target loses 1 Mana Fire: The target becomes Burning X, where X is your Focus x 3. Water: The target becomes Soaked X, where X is your Focus, until they take lightning damage. Lightning: The target becomes Static X, where X equals your Focus x 3. Frost: The target becomes Slowed until the start of your next turn. Earth: The target becomes afflicted with Sunder X, where X equals your Focus, for the next damage they take. Wind: You push the target 10ft. Holy: The target becomes inflicted with Illumination X, where X is your focus / 2. Dark: The target becomes inflicted with Blinded X, where X is your focus, for their next attack.

L4.name: Elemental Burst
L4.description: You cause your attack to burst into the target causing them to take additional damage of that element equal to 2d4 + Focus.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Magic, Artifice, Perception, Linguistics or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Secret Art: Surge of Elements
L8.description: You channel all masteries of the elements and fire a barrage of elemental bolts at the target. You make 7 light attacks, doing Arcane, Fire, Water, Frost, Wind, Lightning and Earth damage respectively. Overcharge : You may spend one more mana to make additional Light attacks, one that does Holy damage and one that does Dark damage.

L1.name: Stygian Comprehension
L1.description: You gain Elemental Mastery: Dark You may use Dark Bolt.

L2.name: Malevolent Phantasm
L2.description: You siphon the energy lost from your allies and make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals Dark Damage.

L3.name: Energy Drain
L3.description: You deal Light true damage to a willing ally other than yourself. You gain Haste , which gives you 2 AP for the rest of this turn. A target can only be affected by haste once per turn.

L4.name: Schadenfreude
L4.description: You redirect an attack to another ally in range of the triggering attack. If they don't react to this, your next Malevolent  Phantasm ignores the requirement and costs no mana.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Religion, Magic, History, Appraise, Deception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason or Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Toughness

L8.name: Secret Art: Spirit Stigma
L8.description: You stigmatize the targets spirit, they are inflicted with Spirit Stigma until the start of your next turn. A target with Spirit Stigma counts as a willing ally for your Eremancer abilities and damaging them fulfills the Malevolent  Phantasm requirement.

L1.name: Evil Eye
L1.description: While you have a Mystic Eye active, you gain a +10 Mystic Eye bonus to perception checks relying on sight. One of your eyes becomes an Evil Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

L2.name: Cursed Evil Eye
L2.description: You open your Cursed Mystic Eye that curses everything in sight. All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range must make a save against your Potency or take Light Dark(Curse) damage. Upkeep : 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.

L3.name: Evil Eye of Lethargy
L3.description: You open your Mystic Eye and inflict lethargy on everything in sight. All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range become Slowed until the start of your next turn, unless they spent 1 RP to resist the effect. Upkeep : 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.

L4.name: Evil Eye of Fear
L4.description: You open your Mystic Eye and inflict fear on everything in sight. All targets in a 90 degree cone up to range must make a save against your potency or become Shaken until the start of your next turn. Upkeep : 1 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend on Perception. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Evil Eye of Death
L8.description: You open your Mystic Eye, focus it on a single target and they instantly die. Upkeep : 3 AP. When you pay the upkeep cost, you may repeat this attack against a new target.

L1.name: Execute the Heretic
L1.description: You may use Execute Heretic

L2.name: Undying Justice
L2.description: If the damage would reduce your HP to 0 or lower, it instead lowers your HP to 1.

L3.name: Divine Storm
L3.description: You make a Heavy attack with your weapon against the target of your Mark of Justice. You then make a Light attack against all other enemies within 5ft and push them back 10ft, regardless of whether the attack hit or not. This light attack is not made with your weapon and always does the damage type of your god (as determined by your Holy weapon key ability).

L4.name: Crusader's Advance
L4.description: You teleport to an empty square next to an enemy you marked with the Mark of Justice.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on any non crafting or gathering skill. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Divine Judgement
L8.description: You make a Heavy attack that deals Holy damage against the target. If your target’s HP is lower than the max damage your attack would deal, this attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage instead of rolling. This calculation only involves your base damage (Base weapon damage + the power). Any other effects added to the damage such as Heavy Blade's bonus damage, Anathema on target etc do not affect the calculation and aren't maximized. An enemy reduced to 0 HP or lower with this ability is immediately killed.

L1.name: Shield the Fallen
L1.description: You may use Shield the Fallen.

L2.name: Undying Justice
L2.description: If the damage would reduce your HP to 0 or lower, it instead lowers your HP to 1.

L3.name: Aura of Resistance
L3.description: You create a 30ft radius Aura of Resistance around yourself until the end of the encounter.  While this aura is active, when an ally other than yourself fails a save you may spend 1 Mana to increase their save value by your Toughness.

L4.name: Holy Declaration
L4.description: You take the Block action against the attack. Afterwards, you challenge all enemies within 5ft of you until the start of your next turn.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on any non crafting or gathering skill. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Divine Shield
L8.description: Until the start of your next turn, you gain Damage Reduction 1000 against all damage types, but you only deal half damage. You gain 2 AP. Must be used as the first action in your turn.

L1.name: Ore Hunter
L1.description: You can gather Tier 2 mining outcrops. You are an expert and tying knots. Using rope, you can secure yourself to objects and safely rappel down to investigate down cliffsides.

L2.name: Focused Detonation
L2.description: Make a gathering check against either Node or Lucky points. If this strike would max out it out, you may instead leave it at 1 away from completion and you gain +1 Strike Dice

L3.name: Mountain Slayer
L3.description: You make a Light attack against a target.

L4.name: Cave Raider
L4.description: Until the start of your next turn, you gain the ability to climb your speed.  In addition if you have rope, you can tie it to a secure object and you can rappel down a cliffside up to 50ft at the cost of 5ft of movement.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Mining.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Take it easy
L8.description: Do not make a gathering check. Instead, immediately collect 25% of the Outcrop’s base material as a bonus (doesn’t affect material totals), but no Node or Lucky progress is made.

L1.name: Holy Orders
L1.description: You may use Holy Orders.

L2.name: Silentium
L2.description: You infuse a light thrown weapon with Sacred Power and Light Attack the target for Light Holy Damage. On damage the weapon disrupts the target’s magic circuits, breaking concentration and preventing the target from using abilities with the Spell keyword. The lodged weapon can be removed for 1 RP or 2 AP, removing the disruption. Combo: If used after Eagle’s Hunt, reduce the AP cost to 0 from 2.

L3.name: Eagle Hunt
L3.description: You leap up to 30ft into the air and then horizontally up to twice your Speed, this movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. You may use Silentium at any point during the movement, gaining the Combo bonus.

L4.name: Deus Vult
L4.description: Can use with active Holy Orders. Your next basic attack or Ave Maria against your Holy Order gains the Lock On and Shieldbreaker keywords against your Holy Order. Must be used before you make an attack and cannot be used in reaction to an ongoing attack.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Roguecraft, Religion, Magic, History, Insight, Stealth, Perception or Expert Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power or Focus.

L8.name: Ave María
L8.description: You attack with a swift double slash in the blink of an eye, making a Heavy Attack that deals Light damage + Heavy Holy damage.

L1.name: Faerie Light Eyes
L1.description: Faerie Light Eyes provide protection against Illusions, giving you the ability to immediately see the reality warping distortions that illusions cause.  The user is not only notified of illusions, but immune to all but your own. One of your eyes becomes a Faerie Light Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

L2.name: Faerie Light Eyes: Hold Person
L2.description: You gaze into the target’s eyes and stun them for 1 turn, reducing their AP and RP to 0. While stunned, the target can also not take any actions.

L3.name: Faerie Light Eyes: Time Dilation
L3.description: Flooding your eyes with magic, you cast a self Illusion causes time slow down. You use the Dodge action with a Dodge bonus equal to 2X.

L4.name: Faerie Light Eyes:  Empty
L4.description: You lock eyes with an enemy, casting an illusion onto the target’s mind. Name an ability that the target had previously used in the current encounter. The target forgets the target ability, being unable to use it completely while the Illusion is in effect. This ability cannot target Secret Arts, Climax Arts or Esoteric Arts. Only one target may be under the effect of this illusion at a time. If the target is non-heroic and under the effect of Faerie Light Eyes: Hold Person, instead the target immediately is rendered insane permanently. An insane target takes no further combat actions. If used on a grunt under the effects of Hold Person, they do not need to meet the normal requirements for this ability. Does not work against Boss type enemies. Some abilities such as those granted by items, passives or racial abilities (such as flight) also cannot be removed by this ability (GM's discretion).

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Insight, Stealth or Perception. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness or Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Faerie Light Eyes: Golden Illusion
L8.description: You copy the target’s ability that was forgotten and add it to your abilities until the end of the encounter. You must still fulfill all requirements to use this skill. This ability is generated from illusions and gains the keyword, Illusion. You can only have one Golden Illusion ability at a time. If the target stops being affected by Empty, you lose your Golden Illusion ability.

L1.name: Farming Basics
L1.description: You gain proficiency in the scythe specialized weapon and can use it as farming tool. You also gain proficiency in the Sickle and can use it as a farming tool and One-Handed axe. You can plant seeds in plots of land that sprout into harvestable Food and Alchemy materials. You can work 10 plots of land. You gain Farmer core abilities.

L2.name: Plow the fields
L2.description: You strike the ground with magical power and make a Light attack against all enemies in a 15ft wide line up to range. The terrain within this range becomes difficult terrain until the start of your next turn.

L3.name: Wither the Stalk
L3.description: You strike an enemy with an attack that saps their strength. You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target cannot add their Power for damage to their next attack. Does not work against Boss enemies.

L4.name: Pull the weeds
L4.description: You destroy one of your planted seeds to give yourself +5 crafting points for this session.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Farming. You also gain 5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Toughness.

L8.name: Scarecrow's Gaze
L8.description: You summon the appearance of whatever someone fears the most. Every enemy within range must make a Save against your potency. On failure, they may not walk closer to you until the start of your next turn unless they have no valid targets to attack without doing so.

L1.name: Fancy Footwork
L1.description: You gain proficiency with Dueling Weapons. While wielding a dueling weapon, you also gain the light blades' Nimble ability, even if not wielding or proficient with light blades.

L2.name: Parry
L2.description: Roll your Heavy Weapon Damage, but add your Focus instead of Power to the roll and treat that as your Block against the attack targeting you. If Parry reduces the damage to 0, you regain 1 RP (cannot go higher than your max RP). On hit effects and maces do not gain their effect if you reduce the damage to 0. When using Parry against an attack, that attack cannot land a critical hit against you.

L3.name: Lunge
L3.description: The attack range of your next basic Light, Heavy or Precise Attack with a melee weapon is doubled.

L4.name: Riposte
L4.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that you used your Parry ability against.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Deception, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness, Cunning or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus.

L8.name: Precise Thrust
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack does not disable the dueling weapon ability.

L1.name: Fighter's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency in 5 common weapons groups. You gain proficiency in all light armor, medium armor and normal shields. You gain +5 HP.

L2.name: Charge
L2.description: You may spend 2 or 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. After you finish moving, you may spend half of the AP you used on this ability on Light or Heavy Melee Attacks.

L3.name: Power Strike
L3.description: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the enemy.

L4.name: Slam
L4.description: You attack a single target for Light Damage. On damage, the target is moved 5ft away from you if they are a Grunt or if your Power is higher than theirs, in addition the target must be no more than one size larger than you. You may spend 1 Mana to ignore the Power requirement.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power, Focus, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Defensive Flexibility
L8.description: You react to the triggering attack with the opposite reaction you used to meet the requirement of this ability. (IE if you used Dodge as your last reaction, you use the Block reaction for this). The first time each encounter your RP goes below half your maximum RP, you regain the Circuit benefit on this.

L1.name: Five Harmonies
L1.description: You may use Luminous Form Stance.

L2.name: Mantra: Pure Intentions
L2.description: You wrap your Threads of Light around the chosen ally and channel your Harmony into them. You may spend up to 5 stacks of Harmony and 1 mana per stack you consume to heal an ally within range for 3+Focus for each stack.

L3.name: Mudra: First Sensation
L3.description: You deliver the first motion, a graceful strike that awakens awareness in both you and your foe and you make a Light attack against the target. On hit, you gain a Harmony stack (In addition to the one you might get if this deals damage.) Combo : When used after entering Luminous Form Stance, the mana cost is reduced by 1.

L4.name: Mantra: Flowing Perception
L4.description: You extend your Threads of Light and make an unarmed light attack against a target within range. On damage, you may pull yourself towards the target and sidestep to the nearest square within 5ft of them. You may also use this on ally. If you do, this always hits and deals no damage. It still gives you a stack of Harmony.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Negotiation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Reason or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus.

L8.name: Dharani: Blooming Conciousness
L8.description: You release all gathered harmony as petals of radiant light that spiral outward from your body. You consume all Harmony stacks and 1 mana per stack to heal all allies within range for (6 + Your focus) / 2 for each stack consumed. If you do not have enough mana for all stacks, this ability instead consumes stacks equal to the mana you can spend.

L1.name: Controlled Blaze
L1.description: When you deal Fire Damage, you may choose not to ignite flammable objects. You gain Fire Mastery.

L2.name: Flame Infusion
L2.description: You surround a willing target in searing flames, changing their typing to Fire II. As a Fire II type, they take half damage from Fire and Frost Damage or attacks with the Fire or Frost keywords unless that attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Water Damage or attacks with the Water keyword. While the ward lasts, they also gain immunity to Burning. The ward lasts until the end of the encounter or until their type is overwritten by a more powerful type.

L3.name: Flame Shield
L3.description: The attacker immediately takes Light Fire Damage.

L4.name: Flame Weapon
L4.description: You touch one willing ally’s or your own weapon and enchant it with Fire. Until the end of the encounter, the weapon deals Fire Damage and grants a +1 Power Enchantment.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Flame Wall
L8.description: You create a wall of Fire that is 30ft long, 5ft wide and 30ft high. This wall must be a straight line. Anyone passing through the wall or starting their turn in it takes Heavy Fire Damage. The wall lasts for 10 minutes or until canceled. Those in the wall when it is casted, may spend 1 RP to sidestep out of the wall. A person can only take this damage once per round.

L1.name: Lightning Weapon
L1.description: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Lightning Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare your chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

L2.name: Flash Star Style: Photon Line
L2.description: You sidestep exactly 25ft in a straight line in any direction and can move over gaps of terrain as long as you end on solid ground. You make a Light attack against all targets that are in your path.  If only one target is in your path, make a Heavy attack instead. If you were flying at least 10ft above the ground when using this ability, you do not need to end on solid ground.

L3.name: Flash Star Style: Thunderbolt Slash
L3.description: You slash the target in a thunderbolt pattern, making a 3-hit attack.  Make 3 separate Light attacks against the target.   Combo: If used immediately after Flash Star Style: Photon Line, mana cost reduced by 1.

L4.name: Flash Star Style: Starlight Crescent Reversal
L4.description: You take advantage of the slow windup of the enemy’s attack, countering with a Light attack of your own. You may still Dodge or Block the triggering attack after this counter.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Athletics, Intimidation, Magic, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Cunning, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Flash Star Style Secret Art: Twin Nova Pursuit
L8.description: You teleport to the target and then knock them 25ft in any horizontal direction.  You then teleport in a straight line to them again and make a Heavy attack.  If the attack is responded to with any RP action, knock them straight back 25ft again, teleport in a straight line to them and make another Heavy attack.

L1.name: Cloudstep
L1.description: You may use Cloudstep.

L2.name: Plume-Treading Art
L2.description: After you use Cloudstep, you treat air as regular walkable terrain until the end of your turn. At the end of your turn, if still standing on air and not Flying, you float back down to the ground without taking fall damage. In addition, after each AP spent on the Move action or an ability that lets you move, you gain 1 Windflow up to a maximum of 6. Each stack of Windflow gives a +5 Windflow bonus to your movement speed. These stacks last until the end of the encounter or until you end your turn without having moved. Cloudstep also always gives you 1 stack, up to your normal cap.

L3.name: Flowing Wind Strike
L3.description: You make a Light attack against the target that deals additional damage equal to double your Windflow stacks. Afterwards, you lose all Windflow stacks. Afterwards, you may Sidestep 5ft though this movement does not give a Windflow stack.

L4.name: Driftwind Evasion
L4.description: You take the Dodge action against the attack and gain a Windflow bonus to your Dodge equal to your Windflow stacks. Afterwards, you lose all Windflow stacks.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Vanishing Thousand Steps
L8.description: You may sidestep to a target within range and make a Heavy attack against them.  Then, until the end of the turn, you may Sidestep to any enemy you can see as part of a melee attack you are about to make. You gain Windflow stacks as if you spent AP on the movement equal to the AP spent on the attack.

L1.name: Forager's Path
L1.description: You gain proficiency in Giant Scissors and proficiency in your choice between Axes or Hori. You may use axes for harvesting foraging outcrops. You gain the ability to harvest Tier 1 Foraging Outcrops. You gain the ability to use natural item as replacements for an Adventurers Kit and Torches such as:  using the sun/moss as a compass, using vines as rope etc.  The material must be available (GM’s discretion)

L2.name: Verdant Instinct
L2.description: Make a gathering check. After rolling, roll two more dice that will be used as your next 2 strike dice values. You may reorder them or replace one with a 5.

L3.name: Lifebeat Sense
L3.description: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of the target until the end of combat.  (The DM should enable health bars for the unit, or you can ask for an approximate percentage). In addition, the target is afflicted by Expose 1, reducing the target’s crit threshold by 1. (20 to crit becomes 19.) Expose is removed once the target is critically hit (regardless of if they defend or not)

L4.name: Divining Petalfall
L4.description: Make a gathering check with a +5 bonus. If the final dice value is even, add it to Node Points. If it’s odd, add it to Lucky Points.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Foraging. You also gain 5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Medicine, Survival or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Reason or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Toughness or Agility.

L8.name: Vivisect
L8.description: You cut the target in half with your scissors or chainsaw, killing them instantly.

L1.name: Focused Weapons
L1.description: You gain Forgemaster Core Crafting Abilities. You can craft using Mithril and Orihalcum.

L2.name: Inspired Finish
L2.description: Make a crafting check. The dice is upgraded to 3d10 and you still add your crafting bonus to this. The crafting immediately ends after using this ability and you may not spend Crafting Points to add artisan bonuses, alloys or similar things.

L3.name: Forged Knowledge II
L3.description: Your bond with the weapon allows you to infuse it with mana at a crucial point. Use when determining attack damage, maximize all weapon dice for that attack.

L4.name: Expertise Study (Blacksmithing)
L4.description: You gain 5 Expertise Points in 3 different blacksmithing crafts. You also gain wielding proficiency in one smithing melee weapon of your choice. You may select specialized weapons with this.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Blacksmithing.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power, Focus or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Shatter
L8.description: You make a Heavy Attack against the target using a Blacksmith’s Hammer. If the target chooses to Block the attack, they gain 100 damage reduction against it. If they do, choose one equipped non-divine arms weapon in their hand that has equal or less crafted enhancements than your hammer and destroy that item, giving it the Broken condition.

L1.name: Tremorsense
L1.description: You gain Earth Mastery. You may use Tremorsense

L2.name: Mud Wall
L2.description: You create a wall 4ft high, 1ft thick and up to 20ft long that serves as low cover. Anybody attempting to get over the wall treats it as difficult terrain. Walls must be placed on solid ground and cannot be stacked on top of eachother. Each 5ft of wall has 60 HP and dissolves if it reaches 0. It otherwise lasts until the end of the encounter. You may spend 1 RP instead of 2 AP on this ability instead.

L3.name: Fissure
L3.description: You slam the ground and create a 15ft wide fissure up to the target point. Those at the edges of the spell’s range may spend 1 RP to Sidestep 5ft out of the effect. All caught in the effect fall down 20ft into the fissure and take falling damage as normal. The spell requires natural ground to be below the touching surface to function. It may work on the bottom floor of a house, but will fail if used higher up or in some dungeons.

L4.name: Seismic Shove
L4.description: You make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against the target. On damage, you may push the target 5ft in any direction.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Earthquake
L8.description: You make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against all enemies in range that are touching the ground. On damage, they fall prone. You also make a Light attack that deals Earth damage against all magically created walls and similar inanimate objects created by magic. You deal 10x damage against those targets.

L1.name: Wall Ride
L1.description: When you create a wall on your turn using your Geomancer or Geomaster abilities, you may move along the wall as it is created. You can jump off at any point of the wall creation, ending in an empty square next to the wall.

L2.name: Earthen Divide
L2.description: You create a wall up to 20ft high, 5ft wide and 20ft long in a straight line. Each Segment of the wall has HP equal to 20 + Focus. Overcharge : You may spend X mana to increase the length by 20 x Xft.

L3.name: Pillar of Earth
L3.description: You create a 5x5, 20ft high pillar below someone. The target may spend 1 RP to step out of the way. Each block of the pillar has HP equal to 20+Focus and the entire pillar collapses if one block is removed from it.

L4.name: Spike Field
L4.description: You create a 20x20ft field of spikes. Any creature moving more than 5ft per movement action across it takes full pierce damage equal to your Focus for each 5ft they move across the field. If the movement through it was forced movement, you only take the damage once. Lasts until the start of your next turn. Upkeep : 1 mana, extends the duration of the spike field by 1 turn.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Second Tremor
L8.description: The enemy falls prone and takes Light damage.

L1.name: Puppet Grandmaster
L1.description: You can summon puppets under your control using Summon Piece. While these puppets follow movement rules as described in the abilities and are always Medium size, they can appear as whatever you wish, decided when you take this class. As an EP action, you may change the appearance of your pieces.

L2.name: Move Piece
L2.description: You move a puppet piece you can see that's under your control. The way it moves depends on the type of piece. When a piece moves, it's a Sidestep. Pawn : Moves up to 2 squares orthogonally or 1 square diagonally in a straight line. Knight : Moves 1 square orthogonally, then 1 square diagonal in the same direction it moved in orthogonally (like a knight in chess). Can pass through allies and enemies. Bishop : Moves up to 8 squares diagonally in a straight line.  Rook : Moves up to 8 squares orthogonally in a straight line. Queen : Moves up to 8 squares orthogonally or diagonally in a straight line. Except for the Knight, chess pieces cannot move through allies and stop their movement when they hit an object or creature. If this happens, it makes a Heavy attack that deals Physical(Bludgeoning) damage against that target with your stats. A knight that makes an attack and does not kill the target remains in its original spot. On damage, a piece is promoted into a higher rank (Pawn -> Bishop/Knight -> Rook -> Queen). A queen cannot promote. On Killing Blow, a piece occupies the square of the thing it attacked.

L3.name: Castling
L3.description: You swap positions with a Rook puppet piece you control.

L4.name: Check
L4.description: You move a puppet piece in such a way (following Move Piece rules) that it can attack an enemy if it moves again. It cannot attack with this movement. At the start of your next turn, you may move that piece as if you used Move Piece without spending AP/Mana or it counting as an ability use.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 to Deception, Linguistics, Magic, Appraise, History, Artifice, Insight, Art, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Checkmate
L8.description: You may move all your pieces as if you used Move Piece on them.

L1.name: Tremorsense
L1.description: You gain Earth Mastery. You may use Tremorsense

L2.name: Steady Ground
L2.description: The target gains Immovable until the start of their next turn. You may also use this for 2 AP instead.

L3.name: Earth Armor
L3.description: You touch a willing ally’s armor and enchant it with earthen power. Until the end of the encounter, it grants a +1 guard and +4 block bonus.

L4.name: Earth Infusion
L4.description: You surround a willing target in mud and rocks, changing their typing to Earth II.  As an Earth II type, they take half damage from Lightning and Earth damage or attacks with the Lightning or Earth keyword unless that attack deals true damage. They take 50% more damage from Wind damage or attacks with the Wind keyword.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Survival or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Earth Shield
L8.description: You grant the target 1 RP they must spend on the Block action against the triggering attack. They gain a bonus to their Block for this action equal to your focus x 2.

L1.name: Gravity Master
L1.description: When you push or pull an enemy on your turn, you may spend 1 mana to increase this distance by 10ft. You may also spend 1 mana to instead ignore the effects of 1 source of Immovable on a target you’re attempting to push, unless that target is permanently Immovable.

L2.name: Gravitational Push
L2.description: You push the target 20ft or pull it 20ft towards you.

L3.name: Singularity Collapse
L3.description: You target a 25x25 square and all creatures within that square must make a save or be pulled 10ft towards the center.

L4.name: Weight of the World
L4.description: You increase the target’s gravity, reducing their elevation by 40ft. This may interrupt movement and if you reduce their elevation down to 0, you slam them into the ground dealing fall damage for the distance they failed to move and knocking them prone.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Secret Art: Black Hole
L8.description: You create a Black Hole at a target location within range. When you cast this and when you pay upkeep, all enemies within 120ft of the black hole must make a save or get pulled 20ft towards it. All enemies within 120ft of the black hole that are moving away from it are considered slowed for that movement. Upkeep: 1 Mana. Instead of paying upkeep, you may detonate the Black Hole making a Heavy attack against all enemies within 15ft of the black hole.

L1.name: Mass Index
L1.description: Your spells with the Gravity keyword deal extra damage to the target based on its size. They deal an additional 1 damage to large creatures and an additional 3 to Huge creatures. You may use Gravity Crush.

L2.name: Compression
L2.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Physical (Crushing) damage. If the target is Large Size or bigger, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.

L3.name: Density Break
L3.description: You make a Precise attack that deals damage equal to the target’s Toughness.

L4.name: Localized Collapse
L4.description: You target a 15x15ft square. All in the area take damage equal to your Focus / 2. If a creature occupies multiple squares in your target square, they take damage for each square they occupy. A creature caught in it may spend 1 RP to avoid the effect.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Absolute Compression
L8.description: You make an attack against the target that deals Double Heavy Physical(Crushing) damage.

L1.name: Giant Strength
L1.description: While in Rage Stance, you may choose to have your size be treated as one size bigger than it actually is. You get an additional +5 bonus to Fitness checks during Rage stance regardless.

L2.name: Unrelenting Assault
L2.description: You may use this ability when an enemy willingly moves out of your melee weapon range to make a Heavy attack against them. You can use this even if they took the disengage action or a similar action that would not make them provoke attacks of opportunity. If the target uses a teleport type move, then you cannot use this ability, unless they Teleport into your weapon range. This is treated as an opportunity attack.

L3.name: Single-Minded Fury
L3.description: You choose a single enemy as the target of your Single-Minded Fury. Your movement speed is doubled when moving towards your target plus you gain immunity to Slowed and difficult terrain. You also gain immunity to any mind-affecting effect that would prevent you from chasing or attacking your target. You gain a 1d4 bonus to accuracy rolls against that target, but suffer a 2d4 penalty to accuracy rolls against any other target. This effect lasts until the end of the encounter or until the target falls to 0 HP or lower.

L4.name: Smash through the pain
L4.description: You gain Smash through the pain , which reduces the damage taken by the next attack by an amount equal to 3 + Power

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Athletics, Perception, Survival, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Power.

L8.name: Victory or Death
L8.description: All melee weapon attacks that you make this turn deal maximum damage on hit. All weapon attacks made against you until the start of your next turn also deal maximum damage on hit. Once used, this cannot be used again until the end of the encounter.

L1.name: Heavy Cavalry
L1.description: You gain Medium Armor and Heavy Armor proficiency. Every enemy damaged by your Trample effects become Challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

L2.name: Rescue & Drop
L2.description: You pick up a willing ally and put them on your mount. They travel with you on the back of your mount until either you or they spend 0 AP or 1 RP to place them back on the ground. An ally that is being rescued can not take any other actions until they are dropped. Only 1 ally can be rescued at a time.

L3.name: Intercept
L3.description: You move towards an ally, Sidestepping them 5ft in a direction of their choice and occupying their square. The triggering attack is made against you and you automatically take the Block action against it. Mounted move rules apply to your movement for this action.

L4.name: Shared Defense
L4.description: Your mount (the last mount you were riding on this arc) may use your defenses instead of its own while within range. In addition, you may spend RP for it while dismounted if your mount is in range.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Animal Husbandry, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Moving Castle
L8.description: You project a defensive aura up to 15ft around you, granting all allies (excluding yourself) the Bulwark buff. While under the effects of Bulwark, allies take 3 less damage. While projecting this aura, you may spend 0 RP to sidestep up to your movement. After you do so, you may not do so again until the start of your next turn. Upkeep : You must spend 1 mana at the start of your turn to continue this effect.

L1.name: Controlled Opportunities
L1.description: You gain Heavy Armor proficiency. When making an attack of opportunity, you gain a +2 bonus to the accuracy and damage roll.

L2.name: Provoke
L2.description: You Challenge an enemy until the start of your next turn.

L3.name: Hold the line
L3.description: Your next Block action costs 0 RP. Until the start of your next turn, unless you use the Dodge action, you become Immovable.

L4.name: Threatening Aura
L4.description: Until the start of your next turn, all enemies in your melee range are considered Challenged by you.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Toughness.

L8.name: Last Stand
L8.description: Until the start of your next turn, you may use the Block action for 0 RP and you gain additional Guard equal to the mana spent on this ability. Once you use this ability, you cannot use it again in this encounter.

L1.name: Holy Weapon
L1.description: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Holy Damage instead of its normal damage type. You may choose to have your weapon emit light as if it was a lantern. You can enable or disable this effect for 1 AP.

L2.name: Judgement Shot
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, an ally other than you within 30ft of you may make a Light attack against the target. They may spend 1 RP to make this a Heavy or Precise attack instead.

L3.name: Twin Verdict
L3.description: You make two Heavy attacks against the target.

L4.name: Sanctity Aura
L4.description: You project an aura 30ft around you that blesses your allies. When an ally makes an attack as part of one of your Gun Paladin abilities, they may choose to make the damage type of that attack the same as your Holy Weapon damage type.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on any non crafting or gathering skill. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Divine Barrage
L8.description: You make a Light attack against the target and instruct others to follow your lead. X allies other than you within 30ft of you may also make a Light attack against the same target.

L1.name: Gun Martial Arts
L1.description: You can fire your pistols while in melee range of an enemy without provoking attacks of opportunity. You can make unarmed attacks even if carrying a pistol in both hands. If wielding a weapon other than a pistol, this no longer applies. When wielding only pistols and no other weapons, your unarmed attacks benefit from your pistol material bonuses.

L2.name: Slide & Shoot
L2.description: You slide forward up to 20ft towards your target. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity and you may pass through enemy space while moving. At the same time, you may make a Light Attack with your pistol against the target at any point during this movement. Your next ability gains Combo : If this attack is an unarmed attack, its AP cost is reduced by 1.

L3.name: Point Blank Shot
L3.description: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.

L4.name: Pistol Whip
L4.description: You make a Light Attack with a pistol in your hand. On damage, the target becomes Unbalanced. This attack benefits from alloys and material bonuses on your pistol (but not from any on your unarmed strike).

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Perception, Deception, Insight, Survival or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness Cunning, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Whirling Death
L8.description: You enter the Whirling Death stance, spinning wildly and shooting at enemies within range. While in this Stance you may spend 2 AP to make a basic Light Attack with a pistol against all enemies within 20ft. When you kill an enemy or make them enter the downed state from with this attack, you may repeat the attack. The Stance lasts until you enter a different Stance or until you make an attack that is not tied to this ability.

L1.name: Gunslinger's Agility
L1.description: You gain proficiency in pistols. You gain +1 Gunslinger bonus to Initiative.

L2.name: Ricochet
L2.description: You may make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) Attack against the target. The target does not benefit from Light Cover against this attack.

L3.name: Warning Shot
L3.description: You fire a warning shot against a target in your range. Your next basic attack or Ricochet ability with a pistol against that target gains the Trick Attack keyword.

L4.name: Quickdraw
L4.description: You may draw a pistol and make a Light Attack with the drawn pistol against the target. The target may not react to this shot.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Stealth, Perception, Insight, Survival, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Cunning, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Fan the hammer
L8.description: You may make 4 Heavy Attacks against the target. Afterwards, the weapon used for this ability cannot be used again until the end of the encounter. If an enemy reacts to this ability with a Dodge or Block type reaction, that reaction is valid for all 4 attacks.

L1.name: Discern Immunities
L1.description: You may use Discern Immunities.

L2.name: Knockback Shot
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target is pushed back 20ft.

L3.name: Pinning Shot
L3.description: You make a Light attack against the target with your weapon. On damage, if there is a wall or similar object directly behind the target, they become pinned against it. A pinned target is considered Rooted until they spend 2 AP to remove the arrow pinning them.

L4.name: Rapid Correction
L4.description: You turn your Light attack into a Precise attack.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus.

L8.name: Flushing Shot
L8.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. The target may choose to sidestep out of cover from your attack to automatically avoid the attack. Otherwise, the attack gains Sure Hit.

L1.name: Tranquil Prayers
L1.description: Your Acolyte, Priest and High Priest Healing abilities heal for 2x value when used out of combat.

L2.name: Cure Touch II
L2.description: You Heal the target for 22 + (4 x Power)

L3.name: Purification Circle
L3.description: You remove all stacks of single debuff from all allies in a 20ft radius circle from target point.

L4.name: Radiant Halo
L4.description: You Heal all allied targets in a 15ft radius from the target point for 11 + (2 x Power). You may use 1 RP instead of 2 AP for this ability. When using RP on this ability, you may use it even when it is not your turn.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Medicine, Religion, Magic, History, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to either Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Walking Church
L8.description: Blesses the target, granting them the status of a church. Until the end of your next turn, the target gains Damage Reduction 1000 against all damage types.

L1.name: Aftershocks
L1.description: You may use Aftershock. When using a Fighter, Highlander or Reaver ability that compares Power against a Boss type enemy, you may treat your Power as 2 higher for that purpose. (Does not affect the dmg roll etc)

L2.name: Steady Stance
L2.description: You enter a Stance in which you become Immovable unless the enemy has more Power than you. If they do, you may pay an additional mana to retain the effect against them for that turn if they would prone you or knock you back. This stance lasts until you enter a different stance.

L3.name: Meteor Cleave
L3.description: You sidestep 10ft towards the target and make a Heavy attack against them.  On damage, if your power is equal or higher than the target's, they are knocked Prone.

L4.name: Cleave
L4.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, you deal Half Pierce Physical damage equal to your Power to all enemies within 5ft of the target. If you miss the attack and use Aftershock in reaction to this missing, Aftershock mana cost is reduced by 1 for that use.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power.

L8.name: Overpower
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. For every point of Power you have over the target, you deal 2 additional damage. Combo : If used after Meteor Cleave, the AP cost is reduced by 1.

L1.name: Eternal Mirane Cage
L1.description: You may use Eternal Mirane Cage.

L2.name: Frost Driver
L2.description: You send ice spikes along the ground towards a single target, making a Heavy attack that deals Frost Damage. This cannot hit a target higher than 5ft above the ground. On hit, the target is Slowed   until the end of their next turn.  If the target is already Slowed, they instead become Rooted, making them unable to move until the end of their next turn. Combo : When used after Icicle Nail or White Thunder hits, reduce the mana cost to 0.

L3.name: White Thunder
L3.description: You target a Glacial Wall in range and fire a bolt of Frost energy that requires line of sight. On impact, the wall is destroyed and explodes into blades of ice, attacking all enemies within 5ft of the destroyed wall with a Precise attack that deals Frost damage. On damage, the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

L4.name: Glacial Bastion
L4.description: You encase yourself in a Glacial Wall that fills your space until the start of your next turn, making you untargetable for attacks during the duration. This Glacial Wall has HP equal to 20 + Focus, any remaining damage is transferred to you (mitigated by your armor).  While encased, you can cast White Thunder on your encased Ice for 1 RP which removes Glacial Bastion. Other than White Thunder, you cannot take any other actions while under the effect of Glacial Bastion.    This Spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Magic or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Toughness

L8.name: Secret Art: Whiteout
L8.description: You create a sudden snowstorm that obscures sight, creating difficult battle conditions.  Attack accuracy for all affected units is reduced by your Focus and sight range is reduced to 60ft. A creature can only target something within their sight range. You and creatures with Frost Immunity are not affected by this ability. You may activate this ability as an Encounter Start action during the Encounter Start phase of an encounter. If you do, you do not pay the RP or initial mana cost. Upkeep : You must pay 2 mana at the start of your turn or the effect ends at the end of that turn.

L1.name: Terrifying Charge
L1.description: When dealing damage with the trample effect or with your Secret Art: Override, any non-heroic target you damage becomes Shaken until the end of their next turn.

L2.name: Cavalry Charge
L2.description: You may spend up to 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. You automatically gain the Trample effect as like the Trample ability once you have moved 20ft. For every 10ft moved, the attack you make as part of the Trample effect gains +1 bonus damage, up to a maximum of +10.

L3.name: Break Away
L3.description: You disengage and may move up to half your speed away from the nearest enemy.

L4.name: Momentum
L4.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. For every 10ft moved during your last action this turn, this attack gains +1 damage up to a maximum of +10 damage. Abilities with the Teleport keyword do not apply for this.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Animal Husbandry, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Override
L8.description: You make a Heavy attack against all enemies in a line and move through them. You keep moving through enemies until you reach an empty spot you can stand in. If there is no valid end position due to an ally occupying the spot or terrain (such as a wall) being in the way, you cannot use this ability.

L1.name: Mage of the Tides
L1.description: You can use Blue Tide. You gain Elemental Mastery: Water You gain the ability to walk on water and skate across its surface—every 10ft of water surface movement only costs 5ft of movement.

L2.name: Aqua Drill
L2.description: You infuse water with your mana firing a spiraling blast of high pressure water, making a heavy attack that deals Water damage against a target within range. You can use either the RP or AP cost for the ability.  The water is used as a projectile and spills anywhere within 5ft of the target at your choice. If you use an RP for this ability, the mana cost increases by 1.

L3.name: Crashing Foam Wave
L3.description: Creates a wave of water originating from a point of water within range.  Shoves an adjacent target of size large or smaller 10ft away from the point of origin.  If the target is on top of the water, you can choose to shove the target in any direction.  You can use either AP or RP for the cost of this ability.

L4.name: Cure Water
L4.description: You cast this ability on water within range, healing a target within 30ft for 11 + Power x 2. You can use either AP or RP for the cost of this ability.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in any Reason, Awareness or Presence category skill.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason, Presence or Awareness

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility.

L8.name: Refreshing Stream
L8.description: You cast this ability on water within range, recovering fatigue and granting a target within 15ft of that point 1 RP.  The target cannot go over their max RP from this.

L1.name: Iaijutsu
L1.description: If you become the target of an attack while you're surprised, you may still react to it and any special properties of an attack that require you to be unaware of the attack (such as Killshot) do not apply to it. You may sheathe and draw katanas for 0 AP once per turn per katana. You start each battle in the 'Iai' state, which is used for Iai abilities. Making an attack with a katana removes the Iai state for that weapon. Using a skill that requires the Iai state requires the weapon to be sheathed and will remove the Iai state for ALL your weapons, unless specified otherwise.

L2.name: Iai Strike
L2.description: You draw your weapon and attack with lightning speed, making a Heavy Attack. You lose the Sheathed state afterwards.

L3.name: Kiri-tsuke
L3.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you regain the Iai state.

L4.name: Chiburi Noto
L4.description: You clean the blood off your katana and sheath the blade. If your next Iai strike with this weapon during this arc is a hit, its Roll Damage is maximized.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Intimidation, History, Insight, Art, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness or Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Uke Nagashi
L8.description: Roll Heavy Damage and treat that as your Block against the attack that’s targeting you. If you reduce the damage to 0, the attacker becomes Unbalanced. On hit effects and maces do not gain their effect if you reduce the damage to 0. After the attack is resolved, you may immediately make an Iai Strike against the attacker for 0 RP. This Iai Strike gains the Sure Hit keyword against an Unbalanced target.

L1.name: Idol's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency in wands, small weapons and light armor. You gain +5 skill points in Art. You may use One Beat, One Heart

L2.name: This is our moment!
L2.description: All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their damage rolls. This bonus is doubled on Heavy attacks. Upkeep: 1 AP

L3.name: Twinkle Step
L3.description: All allies within range gain a +1 Song bonus to their Evasion and Dodge. Upkeep: 1 AP

L4.name: Stay Here With Me!
