L4.description: All allies within range heal for 8 HP. Upkeep: 1 AP, 2 Mana. When you pay upkeep, you heal all allies for 8 HP again.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Stealth, Deception, Linguistics, Insight, Art, Negotiation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Mashup
L8.description: You may activate another song with the Idol keyword. This song’s AP cost is reduced by 2 and this song may go past your regular maximum song limits.

L1.name: Cool Spotlight
L1.description: Your Idol songs gain +15ft range.  This stacks with other key abilities that increase their range. Your One Beat, One Heart song does not count towards your song limit. When paying upkeep for One Beat, One Heart, you may spend 1 mana to double its effect.

L2.name: Never Miss The Beat
L2.description: You begin singing a supportive song. Once per round per ally, when an ally fails to meet the base evasion with an attack, you may spend 2 Mana to add that ally’s focus bonus for that attack. Upkeep : 1 AP

L3.name: Until My Voice Breaks
L3.description: Whenever you’re about to pay mana on one of your abilities with the Idol keyword, you may instead reduce your current and max HP by 8 for each mana you’d spend. This max HP reduction lasts until the end of the encounter and cannot be removed.

L4.name: Offbeat Recovery
L4.description: You give your ally’s attack Lock On, but the damage is minimized (and cannot be maximized) and it loses Full Pierce, Block Crush and any on hit or on damage effects. If used after a target has already dodged, they may Block against that attack for free. Can be used when an ally misses an ability to make it not count as a miss for your Secret Art: Full Combo (but the attack does not actually gain Lock On)

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Stealth, Deception, Linguistics, Insight, Art, Negotiation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Full Combo
L8.description: Your allies gain +4 Song bonus to their damage rolls. This is doubled on Heavy attacks. If an ally misses an attack, this bonus is reduced to +1. Upkeep : 1 AP

L1.name: Ninja Techniques
L1.description: Your Ninja Run now lasts for the entire turn. You may use Genjutsu Kai

L2.name: Kugeki-zan
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target.

L3.name: En-dama
L3.description: You throw a smoke bomb on the ground within range that blocks line of sight in a 5ft radius (15x15 area total) of where it was thrown. Targets inside or within 5ft of the smoke can only see up to 5ft into or out of the smoke. If you’re inside of it at the point it's thrown, you may immediately take the Hide action. The smoke lasts until the start of your next turn. When it ends, if you are inside your smoke, you may immediately move up to your speed and you are considered hidden up until you finish that movement. If you end your movement in cover, you keep being Hidden from people you have cover from.

L4.name: Kage Bunshin: Kyomei
L4.description: Your clone assists in the preparation of your next Ninjutsu, reducing the AP cost of it by 1.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Ougi: Taju Bunshin no Jutsu
L8.description: You create 3 illusionary copies of yourself within 10ft of yourself or your Bunshin clone. These copies can take actions similar to your Bunshin Tai no Jutsu, but each of them may also act with its own 2 AP from the start of your next turn. Each clone has 1 HP and upon taking any damage, they vanish. You may use RP for these clones as normal. Upkeep: 2 AP

L1.name: Living Cover
L1.description: While mounted, any ally within 5ft of you may use you as Low Cover. If an attack would miss them because of your cover benefit, the attack instead hits you.

L2.name: Blocking Move
L2.description: You move in front of the target and their movement action immediately ends. Until the end of their turn, they are Challenged by you and your next Block action against them costs 0 RP. If they willingly move from you through any method (including teleports) you may make a Heavy attack against them with Sure Hit. Your movement may ignore Line Movement restrictions for this ability.

L3.name: Heavy Trample
L3.description: When using Trample, you may use your Toughness for the damage roll instead of your mount’s power.

L4.name: Armored Blow
L4.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. Your next Block against that target costs 0 RP and gains a +10 bonus.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Animal Husbandry, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Unstoppable Onslaught
L8.description: You may move up to your speed in a line. All enemies you pass through and all enemies within 15ft of your ending position take Light damage, become Challenged and Shaken until the start of your next turn.

L1.name: Brace
L1.description: When using the Prepare action to prepare a melee attack with a polearm, if your target of that prepared attack moved more than 20ft that turn (excluding teleports), your attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage. Against a mounted enemy this also gains Sure Hit and on damage, their movement becomes 0 until the start of your turn. On mastering this class, the Sure Hit property (but not the movement nullification) of your prepared attack against mounted enemies now also applies against Beast type enemies that are large size or bigger.

L2.name: Lunge
L2.description: The attack range of your next basic Light, Heavy or Precise Attack with a melee weapon is doubled.

L3.name: Piercing Stab
L3.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target and the target directly behind it.

L4.name: Extending Spear
L4.description: You may make a Light Attack against all targets in a line up to the range.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus or Power.

L8.name: Crescent Sweep
L8.description: You make a Light Attack against all enemies in range. On damage, a target falls Prone.

L1.name: Mage's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency in the Channeling weapon group's weapons and gain Arcane Mastery. Mastery of an element allows you to use it in Channeling weapon attacks and use it to perform minor tricks relating to it. You gain +5 skill points in the Magic skill. You can use Sense Magic.

L2.name: Decipher Magic
L2.description: You may start a skill challenge against a magic effect you can see in an attempt to understand it.   You are able to disable tier 1 bounded fields with this ability.

L3.name: Arcane Barrier
L3.description: You create a Magical Barrier that absorbs damage until it breaks. The barrier has HP equal to 15 + your Focus. The barrier has a Guard of 0 and any damage it takes is subtracted from the barrier’s HP. When the barrier breaks, any remaining damage is subtracted from your HP. The barrier otherwise lasts until the start of your next turn or until you take any action other than the Block action. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity and does not protect against true damage.

L4.name: Glittershards
L4.description: Numerous sparkling arcane crystals swarm the area and block line of sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Glittershards can only see up to 5ft into or out of Glittershards. Glittershards lasts for up to 10 minutes and you can only have 1 Glittershards active at a time. You can end this effect for 0 AP on your turn.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to either Focus or Power.

L8.name: Magic Missile
L8.description: You fire a highly accurate blast of arcane energy at the target, making a Precise Attack that deals Arcane damage against the target This attack does not gain Pinpoint.

L1.name: Mage Knight
L1.description: You may also use Canter after casting a spell.

L2.name: Cavalry Heal
L2.description: You heal the target for 11 + (Power x 2). If the target is mounted, their mount gets healed for the same amount.

L3.name: Mounted Casting
L3.description: You may cast a Spell with an AP cost of 2 or less.

L4.name: Rescue
L4.description: You Teleport a willing ally within range to an empty square next to you. If the target is mounted, you may also teleport their mount together with the target.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Animal Husbandry, Magic, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness, Reason or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Ride of the Valkyrie
L8.description: You Sidestep up to your speed and can move through enemies for this movement. You and every ally you pass through are healed for 11 + (Power x 2). This movement must always be in a straight line, regardless of your mount type.

L1.name: Advanced Artificing
L1.description: You gain Artificer Advanced Crafting Abilities

L2.name: Craft Artificer's Glove
L2.description: You create a personalized Artificer’s Glove that only you have proficiency with.  Choose a glove type with properties of your choosing at the time of creation.  You can modify this glove for an errand action to change the property, but you can only have one property at a time and only one Artificer’s glove at a time. Gamma Glove (Hacker):  Artifice Jamming. For 1 RP you can Jam a small shell artifice within 120ft causing it to malfunction and be unusable until the user spends 1 AP to clear the jam. Sigma Glove (Combat Artificer):  Heat Sink.  0 RP, 1 mana.  Your glove emits frost energy that saps heat from an artifice, allowing it to bypass the once per turn limit a single time.  Overcharge: 1 RP, the mana cost becomes 0. Delta Glove (Specialist):   The glove is specialized for an expertise skill granting you +10 in that skill.  For instance, it might fire an arcane blast to propel you, granting you +10 to jumping. May not choose artisan or gathering skils.

L3.name: Reverse Polarity
L3.description: You invert the roll result. (1 becomes 10, 2 becomes 9 etc)

L4.name: Expertise Study (Artificing)
L4.description: You gain 5 expertise points in 3 different Artificing crafts.  You also gain one basic weapon proficiency or one specialized weapon proficiency of your choice.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Artificing.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Entropic Magic Pulse
L8.description: You send out a wave of energy that disrupts spirit circuits that cancels all temporary magic effects in range. All non-permanent effects within range that are created by an ability with the Spell or Enchantment keyword are affected. Spells that do not have a time limit listed or create a permanent effect such as a Geomancer's fissure are not affected. Bounded Fields and Secret Arts cannot be removed by this ability. In addition, artifices cannot be used by anyone except you until the end of your next turn.

L1.name: Maid Training
L1.description: You gain proficiency in staves (broom), small weapons, sets of missiles and light armor. You gain 5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Roguecraft, Medicine, Common Knowledge, Linguistics, Appraise, History, Perception, Insight, Survival or Intimidation. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills. You may use Graceful Service.

L2.name: Allow me to clean that~
L2.description: You instantly remove a negative effect from the terrain (such as Oil Slick, Sheet Ice, Web etc). Permanent effects such as fissure or effects with HP like a wall cannot be removed with this. A maximum of 15x15ft can be removed in 1 use and you may move to any spot of the cleaned terrain afterwards. In addition, you may target an ally with this to remove 1 negative physical effect from them instead.

L3.name: Please Hold Still~
L3.description: You apply Illumination X to the target where X is your Focus. You cannot benefit from this Illumination yourself, but also cannot consume it.

L4.name: Overtime again?
L4.description: When you take the Heal Injury, Appraise or Mentor IP actions, you may do the same action again for an EP. In addition, if you take the Rest interlude action you may give the benefit to a different character instead. This does not stack with any Rest bonuses they may have already.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Roguecraft, Medicine, Common Knowledge, Linguistics, Appraise, History, Perception, Insight, Survival or Intimidation. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness, Cunning, Reason, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Snack Time Everyone!~
L8.description: You present a tray of refreshing Health and Mana snacks to your allies. All allies within 5ft of you may spend 0 RP to eat a snack. Health: The ally may spend 2 Mana to heal for 15 HP. Mana: The ally recovers 1 Mana. This counts as a character’s one food for the day and a character cannot benefit from this ability if they already had food. Does not count as a meal for the purposes of fending of starvation. You keep the tray of snacks up for 1 turn and a character walking within 5ft of you while it’s up may also spend the 0 RP to eat a snack.  Allies may also spend 0 AP to eat another snack. They can do this once per turn. Upkeep: 1 Mana, you keep the tray up for an additional turn.

L1.name: Status Assessment II
L1.description: You may use Status Assessment II.

L2.name: Blast Away
L2.description: You fire a point blank shot at an enemy unit. The enemy must save against your Potency or be knocked back 5ft and take Light Damage. This ability does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

L3.name: Prone Cover
L3.description: You become Prone. While Prone from this ability, you gain the benefits of low cover against ranged attacks. In addition, all Ranged Weapon Attacks gain the Prone keyword.

L4.name: Consistent Shot
L4.description: You may make a Precise Attack against the target. This attack deals Heavy Damage instead. This attack does not gain Pinpoint.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power or Focus.

L8.name: Perfect Shot
L8.description: You line up the perfect shot, striking an enemy for double Heavy Damage with Sure Hit and Full Pierce. Automatically fails if the target has cover when this ability finishes.

L1.name: Martial Artist's Journey
L1.description: Your unarmed attack damage is treated as a One-Handed Weapon in which you are proficient. You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Intimidation or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM approval). You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills. You can use Discipline.

L2.name: Leg Sweep
L2.description: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, the target falls Prone.

L3.name: Vital Drive
L3.description: You regain HP equal to 5 times the mana spent.

L4.name: Rushing Knee Drop
L4.description: You may spend either 1 AP or 1 RP to leap up to 15 ft and crush a prone enemy within 5ft with a knee attack, dealing Light Damage. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Intimidation, Common Knowledge or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM approval). You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Double Punch
L8.description: You may make two Light Attacks against the same target. You may not make a dual wield attack until the start of your next turn.

L1.name: Armorsmithing Expert
L1.description: You gain the Master Armorer's core crafting abilities You may craft using Mithril, Orihalcum, Primehide and Dragonscale materials.

L2.name: Grindstone Echo
L2.description: You make a crafting check. You may choose the dice result from a previous check this crafting session and use that as your roll value.

L3.name: Armor Up
L3.description: You gain temporary HP equal to the Block value of your armor and shield, up to a maximum of 40 temporary HP.

L4.name: Expertise Study (Armorsmithing)
L4.description: You gain 5 Expertise Points in 2 different armorsmithing crafts. You also gain wielding proficiency in Heavy Armor or Greatshields. In addition, you always gain the expertise bonus when crafting an armor for yourself. An armor crafted this way cannot be worn by other creatures and is effectively valued at 0 clim.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Armorsmithing

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Spiked Armor
L8.description: Until the start of your next turn, the spikes on your armor and shield reflect damage when you are attacked. When an enemy hits you with a melee attack, they take 4 full pierce damage.

L1.name: Peddler of Wares
L1.description: Your in-combat burden capacity increases by 1. You gain proficiency in 1 common weapon group. You gain +5 skill points in Riding.

L2.name: Whisper of the Streets
L2.description: You recall conversations you had with business partners. This grants you a +5 to any Reason check.

L3.name: Procurement
L3.description: By spending an IP, you start the procurement process. Choose a target base item (no modifications) and an amount of that item. Determine the price of the total items and set it as the Procurement Target goal. Every time you gain an IP, you gain 500 points towards the Procurement goal. You may also spend an IP to add another 500 points towards the goal. When the procurement value is equal to the Procurement Target, you may immediately purchase the item. You must purchase immediately or you lose Procurement. You can cancel a Procurement at any time. The Procurement Target Limit is 1000 and for materials this is capped at materials with an ingot/block etc cost of ≤1000.

L4.name: Bulk Orders
L4.description: When purchasing five or more of the same item from an NPC or Procurement, reduce the total price by 10%. For commodities, you must purchase at least 4000 units.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Riding, Deception, Intimidation, Negotiation, Appraise or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning, Reason, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Always Prepared
L8.description: You immediately purchase a single item with no mods that is worth 1000 clim or less (base cost).  You can immediately use the draw/stow action and equip this item into your hand.  Can only be used once per arc.

L1.name: Mime's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency in 1 common and 1 specialized weapon You gain +5 skill points to spend in Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill. As a mime, you’re not allowed to speak. If you speak during an encounter, you cannot use any Mime abilities until the end of the encounter.

L2.name: Imaginary Weapon
L2.description: You ‘draw’ an imaginary weapon or shield in which you are proficient.  This weapon works exactly like a normal weapon would, but only you can wield it and normal people can't see it.

L3.name: Invisible Wall
L3.description: You create an invisible 5ft wide and high wall within range. It gives Low Cover, but it counts as High Cover against the first ranged attacks the wall gives cover from.

L4.name: Dramatic Death
L4.description: You fall prone and may immediately use the Play Dead action. You may use your Art(Mime) for this roll instead of Deception. At the start of your turn, you may stop playing dead and immediately stand up from prone for 0 AP.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Imaginary Consumables
L8.description: You ‘draw’ an imaginary basic consumable alchemy item or minor item that can cost no more than 100c per mana spent on this ability and no more than 500c total.  This consumable works like regular consumables would, but only you can use it, normal people can’t see it and it doesn’t work with abilities that require you to use real consumables like counter-potion. Any items created with this ability only last until the end of the encounter, or for 5 minutes outside of one.

L1.name: Rock and Stone
L1.description: You gain proficiency in 1 armor or in the shield. You also gain proficiency in the Pickaxe specialty weapon. You gain the ability to gather mining outcrops. You gain the ability to create Ingots as an Errand.  See item: Blacksmithing Materials. You may use an IP to do this 4 times instead.

L2.name: Power Rock Strike
L2.description: Make a gathering check at only half of your gathering bonus (rounded down) add the rolled amount to both node and lucky points.

L3.name: Excavation Crash
L3.description: Choose one adjacent location 5ft from the target. The target may immediately use a move action for 0 RP to move there if they wish, you cannot make an attack of opportunity during Excavation Crash. If the target does not move to the location, make a heavy attack against them.

L4.name: Efficient Strike
L4.description: Make a gathering check.  If this maxes node points, all overflow is converted into lucky points.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Mining. You also gain 5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Appraise or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Toughness. In addition your Pickaxe proficiency gains: Superior Armor Pierce: Treats the enemy’s Guard as if it was 1 lower.

L8.name: Rock Fang
L8.description: Make a heavy attack against the target. On damage the target is affected by Armor Sunder 2 , reducing their guard by 2 until the start of your next turn. This attack also immediately benefits from the Sunder effect.

L1.name: Song without Song
L1.description: You may have 1 additional song active at the same time. You learn the language 'Music'.

L2.name: Mist of the Vale
L2.description: A mist rolls out from around you, trapping those caught in it in a misty vale in which travelers are doomed to die. All in the mist must make a save against your Potency when they try to escape it. If they fail their save when they attempt to move out, you may finish the remaining movement for them as long as they end within your mist. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. The mist also blocks Line of Sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the mist can only see up to 5ft into or out of mist. The mist is a 15ft radius around yourself, but if flying it does not go below you. You may choose to exclude allies from the trapping effect. If you do, the upkeep mana cost and initial mana cost is increased by 1. Upkeep: 1 AP

L3.name: Phantoms of the Mist
L3.description: You conjure several phantoms in the mist and make a Light attack against all creatures within your Mist of the Vale. You may spend 1 Mana to exclude allies from this attack.

L4.name: Despair of Isolation
L4.description: Everyone within your Mist of the Vale becomes Slowed until the end of their next turn. They must also make a Save or become Dazed until the end of their next turn. On failure, they also cannot target allies with friendly effects while in the mist until the end of their next turn. You may spend 1 Mana to exclude allies from this attack.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Traveler's End
L8.description: You play the final tunes of the melody that signals the traveler’s ending.  While Traveler’s End remains active, the Potency of your Mist of the Vale and Despair of Isolation is increased by 3. Your Mist of the Vale can no longer be removed and any effect that would remove it instead dispels Traveler’s End. At any point after activating this song, you may spend 1 RP and 5 Mana to make a Sure Hit Heavy attack against all enemies within your Mist of the Vale. On killing blow, you regain 1 mana you spend on the attack (up to 5). Afterwards, the Mist of the Vale ends and cannot be reused in this encounter. Traveler’s End otherwise lasts until the end of the encounter or until the Mist of the Vale is gone. Upkeep: 1 Mana

L1.name: Merchant Lord
L1.description: Procurement Limit increases to 3000 and you can procure materials that cost <= 3000 clim per ingot/block. You gain proficiency in Pistols. Upon mastering this class, the Procurement Limit increases to 4000 and you can procure materials that cost <= 4000 clim per ingot/block.

L2.name: Lord of Mercenary
L2.description: At the start of a new adventure, you can hire an NPC to help you for the entire adventure. You can also use this ability at other times that the DM allows you to. When you summon them, choose a name and appearance for the character unless the DM does. The cost is per week and depends on the NPC. If your hired help dies, you cannot use this ability until you complete a new separate adventure. This ability counts as 1 towards your summon limit as long as the mercenary is in your employ, unless specified. These mercs can be modified through Expert Summoner breakthrough, but this must be done the moment you hire them. Refer to the Monster guide for stats of mercenaries. The mercenaries and costs are: Archer: 250/ Week Acolyte: 750c / Week Tank: 500c / Week Apprentice: 750c/ Week Rogue: 200c / Week Brute: 200c / Week

L3.name: Overcharge and Discount
L3.description: While on adventure, you get a 5% discount from NPC vendors, stacking with Bulk Orders if applicable, and can sell items for 10% more. You may use an IP to give this effect to yourself and up to 9 other characters for that Interlude phase, for a total of a 800c discount.

L4.name: Obvious Intent
L4.description: If an enemy is planning to move into a space in which it can melee attack you, you may move up to your speed away from them.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Riding, Deception, Intimidation, Negotiation, Appraise or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning, Reason, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Shot From The Blue
L8.description: You recall hiring a sniper specifically for a situation like this.  The sniper mercenary, off screen, takes a single shot at the target before retreating. You grant the signal, and the sniper fires, dealing heavy damage with full pierce and sure hit to the target. This shot uses the stats from the Sniper NPC, attacking with +6 Accuracy (if relevant) and dealing 4d6+10 damage. Shot From The Blue does not gain Sure Hit and Full Pierce against targets with Instinct. If the target is a grunt, kill them instantly.

L1.name: Empty Body
L1.description: You may use Empty Body.

L2.name: Ki Blast
L2.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane damage.

L3.name: Flowing Kick
L3.description: You make a Heavy Attack against the target. Combo: If used after an unarmed attack misses, reduce the AP cost of this by 1.

L4.name: Serene Water Stance
L4.description: You enter the Serene Water Stance. While in this Stance, you gain a +3 bonus to your evasion and you may move 5ft everytime an accuracy check against you misses. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. This Stance lasts until you enter a different Stance, you use the Block action or until you move, with the exceptions of this ability and movement abilities with the Unarmed Strike keyword. Making an attack does not cancel this Stance.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Strike of Still Water
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

L1.name: Spore Symbiote
L1.description: You can use Spore Symbiote. You gain Earth Elemental Mastery. You can create a cute mushroom cap hat to wear.

L2.name: Saprophytic Bolt
L2.description: You may make a Light Attack against the target, dealing Earth damage. On damage, the current host of Spore Symbiote is Healed for your Power + 3.

L3.name: Poison Spore
L3.description: You may spend either 2 AP or 1 RP to use this ability. You create an Area of Poison Spores around you or the Host of Spore Symbiote. Units who end their turn in the Poison Spore take Full Pierce Poison damage equal to your Power + 2. You and the host of Spore Symbiote are immune to your own Poison Spore. Poison Spore lasts until the end of the encounter but you can only have one instance of Poison Spore active at a time. The spore stays centered around the original target, even if the target of this ability moves. If the original target of this ability was the symbiote target and you swap the symbiote target, the location of the poison spore moves with it.

L4.name: Amoxicillin
L4.description: You choose up to 10 willing units in range. After spending 1 minute in concentration, you create a cloud of spores that heals a disease that you can identify.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Medicine, Magic or Survival.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness or Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Destroying Angel
L8.description: You make a Precise Attack against an enemy unit within range, dealing Poison Damage. On damage, if the enemy is a Grunt, they are immediately reduced to negative their Max HP and die. On Killing Blow, the current host of Spore Symbiote is healed for 5 + Power x 2.

L1.name: Look of Death
L1.description: You may use Perish. One of your eyes becomes an Destruction Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

L2.name: Destroy
L2.description: The target must make a Save or take Heavy Dark(Curse) damage.

L3.name: Unmake
L3.description: You target one magically created wall or unattended object within range. You instantly destroy a 5x5 square of it or the object entirely.

L4.name: Doom
L4.description: The target must make a Save. On failure, they take additional light damage the next time they take damage that isn't true damage.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Appraise, Perception, Insight, Medicine, Magic or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Void
L8.description: You target one buff or passive effect you can identify from a grunt or heroic target within range. It is immediately removed and cannot be re-applied for the rest of the encounter.

L1.name: Authority
L1.description: You may treat any roll on Negotiation and Intimidation checks that are below 10 as being a 10 and may spend 2 mana before rolling to treat the roll as a 20 instead. One of your eyes becomes an Domination Eye. It may be used to make Mystic Eye type abilities of the appropriate type. An eye can only be a single mystic eye type.

L2.name: Charm
L2.description: The target must make a Save or be charmed by you until the end of the encounter.

L3.name: Kneel
L3.description: The target must make a Save or fall prone.

L4.name: Decree
L4.description: You command the target to Approach or Flee. The target must make a Save or be forced to obey your chosen command, immediately moving up to their speed towards you (if you chose approach) or away from you (if you chose flee).

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Perception, Insight, Magic, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Forbid
L8.description: You choose a target and pick between basic actions or abilities.  Until the start of your next turn, any time the target does the chosen action, they take Full Pierce damage equal to your Focus per AP spent on it.

L1.name: Raise Undead
L1.description: You may use Raise Undead.

L2.name: Soulreap
L2.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. On Killing Blow, you instantly kill the target and immediately cast Raise Undead on the target for 0 AP.

L3.name: Speak with dead
L3.description: You attempt to communicate with the soul of a person who has died recently. This requires you to perform a ritual that takes an hour, that must be performed next to the corpse or where the person died. You must be aware of the identity of the person you’re trying to contact. Finally, you must have a tool such as an ouija board that allows the spirit to communicate with you. Even if the ritual succeeds, the spirit is not forced to answer your questions if hostile to you or it might answer in cryptic ways.

L4.name: Corpse Explosion
L4.description: You detonate 1 of your zombies, making a Light Attack that deals Dark damage against all creatures in range but killing the zombie. You may detonate additional zombies when using this ability to increase the damage this deals by 2 for each additional zombie.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Cunning, Reason or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Bring out your dead
L8.description: You summon 3 zombies, as if you used Raise Undead 3 times. Restrictions on max zombie limit still apply. Does not require corpses.

L1.name: Undead Mastery
L1.description: For every 300 spirit core you possess above 2000, you can control 1 extra zombie with your Create Undead.

L2.name: Raise Undead II
L2.description: You raise the target corpse as a basic undead, such as a zombie. This zombie is treated as a non-heroic unit that you can command directly. You can have multiple zombies under your command, up to your Necromancer level + 1. However, the zombies act as a group under the same token rather than having an individual token. The group acts on your Initiative. Each zombie has a single point of HP and immediately dies, but you only lose 1 zombie per attack the group takes, including AoE attacks that do not deal Holy Damage. AoE attacks that deal Holy damage remove a number of zombies equal to the damage taken. The zombie group has a focus and power of 3 + 1 for every 3 zombies, rounded down. They have an Agility of 2 and Toughness equal to 4. They have access to all basic actions, but otherwise have no special abilities. As a non-heroic entity, they only have access to a single RP. Because they are undead, they are immune to all mind-affecting effects. A raised undead lasts until the end of the arc or until killed, after which the corpse cannot be raised again in any way. Overcharge: You may spend 1 Mana to raise a non-humanoid corpse.

L3.name: Thanergetic Bloom
L3.description: You summon a temporary Zombie as if you used Raise Undead. It disappears at the end of the encounter (or immediately if used outside of an encounter).

L4.name: Command Undead
L4.description: You may have one of your Necromancer summons act as if they had spent 1 AP.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Cunning, Reason or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Skeletal Champion
L8.description: You drain the surrounding area of energy and form a skeletal champion until the end of the encounter. (Stats can be found in the Monster page) This champion takes 2 of your summon limit. Any zombies you had active when you summoned this are instead converted into temporary HP for the champion at a rate of 5 HP per zombie. The champion acts after you on the initiative, but cannot take AP actions on the turn it is summoned. Upkeep: 2 AP Overcharge : You may spend 5 mana to give your summon the ability to act on the turn it is summoned.

L1.name: Ninja Style
L1.description: You gain proficiency in both Small Weapons and Sets of Missiles. You may use Ninja Run.

L2.name: Kibaku Fuda Shuriken
L2.description: You may make a Heavy Attack by throwing a weapon with an explosive tag attached at a target. Regardless of whether it hits, the target and others within 5ft of the target must then make a save against Potency or take Light Fire Damage.

L3.name: Kawarimi no Jutsu
L3.description: The triggering attack automatically misses and you may Hide for 0 AP/RP, then move up to your Speed without provoking attacks of opportunity.

L4.name: Bunshin Tai no Jutsu
L4.description: You create a body double of yourself that has the same stats you do at the time of creation. You and the body double share the same HP, Mana, AP and RP. Any buffs applied to your clone also applies to you (but not vice versa). When taking an action, you may choose to let the user be yourself or the body double. However, the body double may only use basic abilities and abilities with the Ninjutsu keyword and cannot create more body doubles of itself.  When you take the movement action or use a non-teleport movement ability, your clone may move for the same amount of distance as you moved. You may spend 0 AP or 1 RP to dismiss the body double. A clone can never travel more than 300ft from your actual body, but while it lasts you may spend 2 AP to swap locations with it. A clone lasts until you rest.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Kage Shuriken no Jutsu
L8.description: You attack by throwing two weapons at the target, one hidden in the shadow of the other. Both of these are considered Light Attacks. If you fail your Accuracy roll on the first one, the second gains Sure Hit.

L1.name: Light Cavalry
L1.description: While mounted and while you and your mount both wear light armor or no armor, you ignore natural difficult terrain.

L2.name: Hit & Run
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, you may move up to your speed.

L3.name: Running Shot
L3.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target.

L4.name: Trailblazer
L4.description: You move up to your speed. Any allies within 30ft of where you started moving may spend 1 RP to move up to twice their speed towards you. They ignore the effects of natural difficult terrain for this movement.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Animal Husbandry, Riding, Flight, Intimidation, Perception, Insight or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Chase the Horizon
L8.description: You focus on a single enemy and maintain a constant position from them. Whenever the target moves, you may move the same amount as they did (up to your movement speed) away from them for 0 RP. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target, but does provoke from other enemies.  Every time this happens, you may make a Light attack against the target with a ranged weapon. If the target spends multiple AP on a single movement action, you may make an amount of Light attacks equal to the AP they spent. Lasts until the start of your next turn or until you can no longer see the target.

L1.name: Expert Scribe
L1.description: You gain +5 points in Art: Calligraphy expertise skill. This is not doubled for expertise bonus. You may draw scrolls, talismans or similar objects for 0 AP once per turn. When you do, reduce the AP cost of that talisman by 1. Even if you do not consume the talisman, it only benefits from the AP reduction once per turn.

L2.name: Create Talisman
L2.description: You may create a talisman or scroll by spending an interlude point. Choose an Spell that you know or choose a specialized talisman, such as a Sealing Talisman. You inscribe that Spell onto a piece of paper. A talisman of a Spell allows you to use the Spell at a different time. When you use it, it is consumed. A Spell talisman costs as much AP and mana to use as the original Spell does.  You may craft up to 5 talismans per interlude point. A secret art talisman takes up 3 of these slots. When crafting, you may make no more than 2 of the same spell. A crafted talisman costs 1 burden to carry with you. A Secret Art talisman costs 2 burden and can only be used through the Secret Talisman ability. Crafting a talisman costs 100 calligraphy units per AP and Mana of the spell. A spell with no AP or Mana costs 50 units. If the spell has an RP cost and no AP cost, it costs 200u per RP. If the spell has a casting time longer than 4 AP (ie 10 minutes), then treat the spell as having a cost of 4 AP. Some spells, such as Summon Lesser Eidolon and Summon Eidolon may be unavailable.

L3.name: Preparedness
L3.description: Up to 3 talismans, scrolls or similar objects you carry do not count towards your burden.

L4.name: Sealing Talisman
L4.description: You attach a Sealing Talisman to the target. Non-heroics become Stunned immediately, while heroic targets must spend 2 AP to remove it from themselves. If they do not remove it by the end of their turn, they become Stunned. While the talisman remains attached, the target is stunned. Anyone within touching distance of the talisman may spend 2 AP to remove the talisman, immediately removing the stun effect. If the talisman is not removed, it lasts until the end of encounter or until the target takes damage. A person can only be affected by 1 Sealing Talisman at a time.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Medicine, Religion, Magic Perception, Insight, Art or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Talisman
L8.description: You use a talisman you possess that contains a Secret Art. This functions like using a normal talisman. You may only use this once per encounter. Does not count towards your Secret Art usage for this encounter.

L1.name: Receive Oracle
L1.description: You may use Receive Oracle.

L2.name: Scry
L2.description: You designate a point that you can see within range, creating a magical ward at that point. If you focus you can shift your perception to that ward and see and hear everything within line of the sight of that ward in a 30ft radius. The ward can persist as long as you want over any distance, but you can only have one instance of Scry active at a time. The ward is invisible and inaudible, but can be detected through magical means.

L3.name: Foretell
L3.description: You receive a vision of the near future. Roll a d20 and store that number. When you or your allies are going to roll that dice type, you can instead replace it with your dice roll, you then lose your Foretell dice. You can only have one Foretell dice at a time, casting Foretell again overwrites the previous dice. Foretel dice last until the end of your next turn. After rolling, you may spend 1 mana to reroll the dice once. After doing this, you can't do so again for this use of the ability.

L4.name: Prediction
L4.description: You remove the keyword Sure Hit and Lock On from the triggering attack and the target gains a +2 Dodge Bonus for their next Dodge action.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Appraise, History, Magic, Insight, Perception or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Gate of Fate
L8.description: You subvert fate and a bad end, twisting reality into its most fortunate outcome. When a target ally rolls a 1, you can instead change it to a 20.

L1.name: Boomerang
L1.description: When you make an attack with a throwing weapon, or take the thrown attack basic action, you may retrieve the weapon or draw a similar weapon at no cost.

L2.name: Long Toss
L2.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target. This attack has triple the range it would normally have.

L3.name: Fan of Knives
L3.description: You may make a Light Attack against all enemies in range. This is considered a Ranged Weapon Attack that does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

L4.name: Rappelling Dagger
L4.description: You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you may move to the closest available spot within 5ft of the target. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Can be used against non-living objects and the on damage part always applies when used in that way.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Stab & Throw
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against a target in melee range. You may then use the same weapon to Heavy Attack a different target within your ranged weapon range or thrown attack range. This second attack does not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target of your first attack.

L1.name: Phantom Thief
L1.description: You are able to disable and modify t2 and t3 bounded fields. You may use Stolen Skill.

L2.name: Stolen Power
L2.description: Make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack that deals Arcane damage against the target. You use their Power for the damage calculation. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

L3.name: Duplicate
L3.description: You attempt to analyze the spell and duplicate it. After the triggering spell resolves, immediately cast a copy of it. You must select a valid target for this copy, pay any additional mana cost originally on the spell as well as pay any costs that are not AP or RP. Failure to do so will make the duplicated spell fizzle, dissipating the magic harmlessly into the air. Upon successfully copying the spell, it resolves with the same damage and effects as the original spell, though using your stats to resolve them. The cost is 1 RP for a 0-2 AP spell or 2 RP for a 3-4 AP spell. Spells with a higher cost cannot be duplicated. Secret Arts and Esoteric Arts also cannot be duplicated and upon attempting to do so, this ability is canceled and any cost refunded. Unique spells by heroic or boss enemies may also be impossible to duplicate (GM's discretion).

L4.name: Grand Theft Horse
L4.description: The target must make a save against your Potency or be immediately dismounted and knocked prone next to their mount. You may then spend 0 RP to immediately mount it. Does not work against creatures that are considered a mount by themselves such as Dullahans or Centaurs.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness or Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Steal Heart
L8.description: The target must make a save or become Charmed until the end of the encounter. If you use this on a Grunt level enemy and you charm them, you may choose their actions when it's their turn in addition to Charm’s normal effect. You may only have 1 target charmed at the same time.

L1.name: Benevolence
L1.description: You gain Elemental Mastery: Holy Your attacks do not consume Illumination on miss. You may choose not to use the effect of Illumination on a target.(Must be declared before an attack is made).

L2.name: Brilliance
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target dealing Holy(Light) damage. On damage, inflict Illumination X, where X equals your Focus / 2 (rounded down) until the end of your next turn.

L3.name: Gleaming Cut
L3.description: You attack with blades of pure light making a light attack against the target, dealing Holy(Light) damage. On damage, inflict Illumination  X where X equals your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn.

L4.name: Illuminating Flash
L4.description: You select a point within range. All targets in a 15x15 area centered on the point must make a save against your Potency or be inflicted with Illumination X where X  your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn. They also become Blinded 5 for their next attack.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Religion, Art Magic, History, Appraise, Negotiation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Power.

L8.name: Crucified by Radiance
L8.description: You make a light attack that deals Holy(Light) to any targets in a 5ft wide line. At any point of the line you can draw a second 55ft long perpendicular line centered on that point of the initial line. You make another Light attack against all caught on this second line and on damage you inflict Illumination X where X is your Focus / 2 (Rounded Down) until the end of your next turn. If a target gets hit by both lines, the second line deals Heavy damage and inflicts your full Focus in Illumination instead.

L1.name: Pierrot's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency in small weapons, bludgeoning weapons and light armor. You gain +5 skill points to spend in Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill. You gain 2 Damage Reduction against pies.

L2.name: Pie Toss
L2.description: You deal 2 damage to the target. This damage can not be increased and does not trigger extra damage effects on the target. Can be used while downed, as an attack of opportunity, Encounter Start and Encounter Conclusion.

L3.name: Flower Squirt
L3.description: You press your flower and make a Light attack against the target that deals Water damage. On damage they are Soaked for X, where X equals your Focus until the next time they take Lightning damage.

L4.name: HONK!
L4.description: You place a clown nose on the target and honk it. The target must succeed at a Save or become challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Art. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in this skill.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Agility or Toughness

L8.name: Banana Peel
L8.description: You toss a banana peel in front of the target and they must make a Save or fall prone. If they fall prone, you may immediately use Pie Toss against them for 0 RP.

L1.name: Studied Healer
L1.description: You gain +5 skill points in the Religion skill. Followers of your Religion are more obligated to listen to you, granting you a +5 Negotiation Bonus when dealing with them.

L2.name: Sacrament
L2.description: You touch one willing ally’s or your own weapon and bless it. Until the end of the encounter, the weapon deals Holy Damage and grants a +1 Power Enchantment.

L3.name: Purify
L3.description: You cleanse a target, removing all stacks of a negative effect of your choice that you are able to identify.

L4.name: Holy Light
L4.description: You Heal the target for 8 + Power

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Medicine, Religion, Magic, History, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to either Power or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art:  Revitalize
L8.description: You pray for a Downed ally. The ally’s HP becomes 0 and then heals for your Power x 3. They may stand up from prone after this healing. Overcharge: You may pay X extra mana to make the target heal + 7 HP for every additional point of mana spent.  This ability does not work on Mortally Wounded allies.

L1.name: Greatshield Master
L1.description: You gain proficiency in Greatshields. While wearing a Greatshield, any ally standing behind you that is the target of a ranged attack may treat you as high cover.

L2.name: No getting past!
L2.description: You may make a Light (0 RP) or Heavy (1 RP) attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Slowed until the end of their turn. If the target is already Slowed, they become Rooted. This ability is treated as an attack of opportunity.

L3.name: Provoke II
L3.description: You Challenge the enemy until the end of the encounter. You may only have 1 target Challenged at the same time through this ability.

L4.name: Bullet Magnet
L4.description: Until the start of your next turn, any single target Ranged Weapon Attack made against an ally in range is made against you instead.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Fitness, Awareness or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Shield Wall
L8.description: You and your allies in range gain Shield Wall , which reduces the damage they take from the triggering attack by 75.

L1.name: Controlled Blaze
L1.description: When you deal Fire Damage, you may choose not to ignite flammable objects. You gain Fire Mastery.

L2.name: Fireball
L2.description: You hurl a Fireball at a 15x15ft area, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in the area.

L3.name: Incendiary Ray
L3.description: You may make a Light Attack that deals Fire damage against all targets in a 10ft wide line up to the range. On damage, inflict Burning X where X is your Power x 3.

L4.name: Ignite
L4.description: You may use this as a reaction after you deal Fire Damage to an enemy to set them on fire, causing them to become Burning X, where X equals your Power x 3. Overcharge: You may target additional enemies with this ability if you hit them with the same ability or attack. You may pay 1 mana per target beyond the first to also affect them with this ability.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Pyroblast
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target that deals double Heavy Fire Damage. This attack gains Lock On against a target that has the Burning condition that you inflicted on it.

L1.name: Eternal Flames
L1.description: When you would apply Burning on your turn, you instead apply Hellfire. Hellfire functions like Burning, but it can no longer be removed the normal way if not removed before the end of the target’s next turn. Hellfire is automatically removed at the end of the encounter. If you apply Hellfire to a target that is already burning, you deal extra fire damage equal to your Power.

L2.name: Blast Wave
L2.description: You may make a Light attack that deals Fire damage against every character within 10ft of you. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft. This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

L3.name: Fireball II
L3.description: You hurl a Fireball at a 15x15ft area, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in the area. On damage, they become Burning X where X equals your Power x 3 Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to increase the size of the area. Every mana spent increases the size by 5ft.

L4.name: Fireball Barrage
L4.description: You hurl three Fireballs at three separate 15x15ft areas, making a Light Attack that deals Fire Damage against all units in each area. Each unit can only be attacked once per use of this ability, even if hit by multiple fireballs.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Meteor
L8.description: You mark a 30x30ft area and begin summoning a meteor to strike it at the start of your next turn. Those in the area when it lands take Heavy Fire Damage. You cannot use the Prepare action on this ability. Overcharge: You may spend extra AP on this ability to increase the damage and size of it. For every extra 2 AP spent on it, the size increases by 5ft and the damage increases by your Power. If the Overcharge increases the AP cost to above 4, this ability gains the Setup keyword. You mark the area of this ability when you have finished spending all AP on it and not before. The maximum AP you can spend on this ability is 16 AP.

L1.name: Ranger's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency in light and medium armor, a common ranged weapon group and a common melee weapon group. You gain 5 points in one of the following: Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills. You can use Status Assessment.

L2.name: Track
L2.description: You find any tracks that aren’t hidden. Once you find tracks, you can follow them at normal speed without having to make checks.

L3.name: Guided Aim
L3.description: You gain a bonus to your next accuracy roll equal to the mana spent on this ability. If the attack is a Precise Attack, the bonus gained is doubled.

L4.name: Crippling Attack
L4.description: You make a Light Attack against the target. On damage the target is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Toughness.

L8.name: Snap Shot
L8.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon. You do not add your Focus to the accuracy roll.

L1.name: Overwhelming Critical
L1.description: When you roll a critical hit you may use Aftershock even if the attack didn’t miss. This use doesn’t count against the normal use limit of it and this effect still applies even if the critical hit was blocked or otherwise defended against.

L2.name: Sweeping Stance
L2.description: You enter a stance in which you spin your weapon around in a circular motion and lash out against any enemy that approaches. When an enemy enters your weapon’s range you may make an Attack of Opportunity against them. An enemy moving while already being in your attack range does not provoke. Your weapon's range for these attacks of opportunities is increased by 5ft (This does not affect your normal threaten range). The stance lasts until you make an attack that isn’t an Attack of Opportunity.

L3.name: Full Power Swing
L3.description: You may make a Heavy attack that does double heavy damage.

L4.name: Shieldcrusher
L4.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If they Block against this attack and are wielding a shield or greatshield, that shield becomes Broken.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend on Athletics, Riding, Intimidation, Perception or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Power.

L8.name: Secret Art: Bladestorm
L8.description: You enter a stance in which you continuously spin your weapon around your body. When activating this ability, you may make a Heavy attack against all enemies within your melee weapon range. While the stance lasts you may make a Heavy attack against all enemies within your melee weapon range at the start of your turn. You can move while in this stance. If you move close enough to an enemy for them to be within your melee weapon range, you may make a Heavy attack against them. You can only attack a creature once per round through this ability, regardless of how many times you move closer to them. Upkeep : 2 Mana, 1 AP

L1.name: Rogue's Journey
L1.description: You gain proficiency with light armor and with a group of One-Handed weapons. This list currently is: Small weapons, Light swords, Dueling weapons and Set of missiles. You gain +5 skill points in Roguecraft and +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM Approval).  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills. You can use Feint.

L2.name: Evasive Maneuver
L2.description: You Sidestep 5ft in any direction. When used on your turn, you may spend 1 mana and 0 AP on this ability instead.

L3.name: Movement Burst
L3.description: You may move up to your Speed + up to 15ft per mana spent on this ability. Any unspent movement is lost afterwards. If you spend more than 1 Mana on this ability, it loses the Stealth keyword.

L4.name: Sneak Attack
L4.description: You may make a Heavy Attack against the target.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or Common Knowledge.  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Devastating Strike
L8.description: You make a Light attack against the target.

L1.name: Saboteur
L1.description: You gain proficiency in Saboteur Thread Daggers. You may use Presence Concealment.

L2.name: Flash Bomb
L2.description: You throw a Flash Bomb at a point within range that explodes in an 25x25 area centered on that point. All targets within the area must save against Potency or become Dazed.

L3.name: Scouting Ahead
L3.description: When traveling stealthily across the map, you can choose to move slightly ahead of the party when moving. If you do, you treat your roll as the lowest roll of the party.

L4.name: Wire Sweep
L4.description: You whip your wire to ensnare the target. If they fail their save against your Potency+2 they are rendered Prone and take Light Damage.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill in Stealth or Stealth Expertise

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Chemical Explosive
L8.description: You place a Chemical Explosive package that detonates after one minute. The explosion has a 15 ft radius and deals Double Heavy damage. The package makes an obvious noise after it has been planted that can be heard within the radius. The explosive charge deals 5x damage against inanimate objects. You can create a Chemical Explosive during an interlude phase for free, but can only carry one at a time. The check to disable a Chemical Explosive is equal to 20 + 2 x Power of the creator.

L1.name: Augmented Casting - Increased Reach
L1.description: You may use Increased Reach.

L2.name: Lengthened Incantation
L2.description: You lengthen the time it takes to cast your next Spell to empower it. You may add 2 AP to the cost of your next spell with the Spell gaining additional Light Damage on it. If you cannot pay this AP cost this turn, the Spell also gains the Setup keyword. If the Spell has multiple attack rolls or different damage rolls, this bonus only applies to one of them. However, if the spell is a Scattering AoE spell then the bonus damage applies to all targets of that spell. If that Scattering spell hits a target more than once it only applies to one damage roll. If the spell lasts for multiple turns, it only applies to the initial casting.

L3.name: Selective Casting
L3.description: For the next Spell you cast, you may choose to have it not affect a number of targets equal to your Focus. Only affects spells with an instantaneous effect (excluding setup things). Lingering spell effects such as Glittershards cannot be used with Selective Casting.

L4.name: Dualcast
L4.description: You immediately repeat the last used ability with the same target. Any cost must be paid as normal.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points in Appraise, Medicine, Magic, Religion, History, Flight, Artifice or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Secret Art: Overcharge
L8.description: Reduces the mana cost of your next Spell cast this turn by 3. You cannot gain mana from this.

L1.name: Sanctioned Healer
L1.description: When you attack an enemy with Sanctify, you may choose not to trigger the effect of it. You gain Elemental Mastery: Holy

L2.name: Consecrating Bolt
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On damage, you inflict Sanctify 1

L3.name: Radiant Verdict
L3.description: You make a Heavy attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On hit, inflict Sanctify 1

L4.name: Call to Grace
L4.description: You trigger the effect of Sanctify, healing the target of the attack by your sanctify amount (and reducing the sanctify stacks). If the attack targets multiple creatures, you only heal one.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Medicine, Religion, Magic, History, Insight, Negotiation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Reason or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus.

L8.name: Benediction
L8.description: You make a precise attack against the target that deals Holy damage. On damage, inflict Sanctify 3. This attack does not benefit from Pinpoint.

L1.name: Independent Actor
L1.description: When working alone (No known allies within 300ft of you) you gain a +10 bonus to Perception, Insight, Survival and Stealth checks. Must be alone for at least 15 minutes to gain this benefit. You gain a +5 bonus in Art (Cartography) expertise. This is not doubled for expertise bonus. You may use Scout’s Retreat.

L2.name: Squadsight
L2.description: An ally that can see or hear you within range may use your Perception score until the start of your next turn. They may also see from your position rather than their own and they may calculate their ranged weapon range (but not LoS) from your position instead of their own. This new range may not exceed twice their normal range.

L3.name: Pathfinder
L3.description: You may move up to your speed and you ignore difficult terrain penalties for this movement. Until the start of your next turn, all terrain within 20ft of you is not considered difficult terrain for your allies.

L4.name: Hide in bush
L4.description: You take the Hide action and are considered to be in cover for the purposes of remaining stealthed. This lasts until you take any action or speak.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain 5 skill points to spend on Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry, Art or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Awareness.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus or Agility.

L8.name: Secret Art: Ambush Shot
L8.description: You make a Heavy attack that does maximum damage instead of rolling. This attack does not break your stealth.

L1.name: Fire Weapon
L1.description: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Fire Damage instead of its normal damage type. You must declare your chosen damage type before making the accuracy roll.

L2.name: Trial By Fire
L2.description: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, they are challenged by you until the start of your next turn.  If this does not deal damage, they cannot be challenged by you until the start of your next turn.

L3.name: Scorching Reprisal
L3.description: You make a Heavy attack of opportunity against the target. Your next basic attack of opportunity against that target before the start of your next turn costs 0 RP.

L4.name: Molten Domain
L4.description: Until the start of your next turn, the ground 5ft around you becomes like burning ground. Any enemy willingly leaving or moving through this area other than entering it becomes Burning X, where X is your Focus x 3. The domain burns away other friendly damage aura effects while in effect. Effects that would normally trigger upon ending the turn in it (such as Poison Spore) don't trigger if someone ends their turn in the Molten Domain.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Magic, Perception, Intimidation, Survival, Art or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Fitness, Reason or Presence.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Agility or Toughness.

L8.name: Infernal Bastion
L8.description: You surround yourself with flames and take the Block action against the attack. If you reduce damage of this attack to 0, inflict Burning X on the target where X is your focus x 3.

L1.name: Nightstalker
L1.description: You gain 60ft darkvision, allowing you to see perfectly in the dark even without a source of light. If you already have darkvision, the range of it improves by 60ft.

L2.name: Shadow Step
L2.description: You may Teleport up to twice your movement speed. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 2.

L3.name: Shade Form
L3.description: You become like a shade becoming near weightless and gaining the ability to pass through spaces occupied by other creatures. You can also slip through small cracks in walls or doors, as long as they are at least 1inch wide and tall. Upkeep: You must pay 2 mana at the start of each turn or this ability ends. During the night, the mana cost and Upkeep of this is reduced by 2.

L4.name: Vanish
L4.description: You may immediately take the Hide action. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 1.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Agility.

L8.name: Shadow Cloak
L8.description: You cloak yourself in Shadows, giving you a +5 bonus on Stealth checks for 1 hour or until end of encounter. It also allows you to hide even when not behind cover or concealment. During the night, the mana cost of this is reduced by 2.

L1.name: Shared Darkness
L1.description: The range of your darkvision increases by 60ft. You may use Darkvision.

L2.name: Hide in Shadows
L2.description: You jump into a target’s shadow. If you were hidden before using this ability, you remain hidden inside the shadow. Else, the target or any other enemy may attack the shadow as if they were attacking you. If you take damage, you are forced out. While you’re inside the shadow, you travel with the target when it moves, including if it teleports, but cannot take actions other than exiting it. You may exit the shadow willingly for 0 RP. When you exit it, if you were hidden, your next basic attack that turn against the target whose shadow you were hiding in gains Full Pierce.

L3.name: Darkness
L3.description: You conjure a 15x15ft area of pure darkness within range. The darkness blocks line of sight. Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Darkness can only see up to 5ft into or out of Darkness. In addition, any targets within the Darkness that do not have Darkvision or a similar ability that lets them see in darkness are considered Blinded 2 (nightvision does not apply). This lasts for up to 10 minutes and you may end this effect for 0 AP. The mana cost of this ability is reduced by 2 during the night.

L4.name: Sable Grace
L4.description: You take the Dodge action against the triggering attack. You remove Lock-On from this attack and treat your Dodge as 99 against it.

L5.name: Skills
L5.description: You gain +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Roguecraft, Perception, Insight, Intimidation or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.

L6.name: Heart
L6.description: You gain +1 to Cunning.

L7.name: Soul
L7.description: You gain +1 to Focus, Power or Agility.

L8.name: Secret Art: Nightcaller
L8.description: Until the end of the encounter, it is considered night for all your abilities and items that are affected by it.

L1.name: Holy Weapon
L1.description: When attacking with a weapon, you may choose to have the weapon deal Holy Damage instead of its normal damage type. You may choose to have your weapon emit light as if it was a lantern. You can enable or disable this effect for 1 AP.

L2.name: Holy Shield
L2.description: Your gain Holy Shield , which gives your next Block action gains a +2 guard bonus (not doubled again). If you reduce the damage you take with your next Block action to 0, you gain 3 temporary HP. Overcharge: You may spend up to 3 additional AP on this ability. Each extra AP spent increases the Guard bonus and temporary HP gained by 3.

L3.name: Aura of Protection
L3.description: You create a 30ft radius Aura of Protection around yourself. While this aura is active, when an ally within 30ft of you takes the Block action you may spend 1 Mana to replace their Block Value with your own.
